definition.en: The inner senses deal with what actually is.
definition.zh: 内在感官处理的是实际存在的东西。

definition.en: The inner senses are concerned with vitalities beneath the camouflage.
definition.zh: 内在感官关注的是伪装之下的生命力。

definition.en: The inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
definition.zh: 内在感官是这两个场域之间的连接器之一。

definition.en: The inner senses are equipped to let you perceive inner reality.
definition.zh: 内在感官被设计来让你感知内在实相。

definition.en: The inner senses have an immediate, constant knowledge of the body in a way that the outer senses do not.
definition.zh: 内在感官以外在感官所不能的方式，对身体拥有直接、持续的知识。

explanation: 内在感官是直接体验基本实在的感知能力，与外在感官不同，它们不依赖时空伪装模式。外在感官将能量转化为物质世界的伪装，而内在感官直接感知伪装之下的生命力与真实。内在感官持续运作，即便意识层面未察觉，没有它们，任何存在都不可能。它们能超越时空，因为时空本身就是伪装。内在感官如同连接不同场域的桥梁，将来自内在世界的活力数据传递给心智，再通过潜意识与大脑沟通。它们不扭曲现实，而是直接浸入价值气候的海洋，看穿伪装的变化。通过训练，可以有意识地使用内在感官，感知到分子舞蹈等未被外在感官扭曲的真实。内在感官本身即是行动，改变感知者与被感知者。它们与心理时间紧密相关，是通往更完整实相的关键。

quotes.text: The nature of basic reality is known according to the degree to which it is directly experienced, and it can only be directly experienced through the use of the inner senses. The inner senses are of course utilized on your plane, as on any other, constantly. Without any such use no existence would be possible. And without the unconscious and constant use of the inner senses you could not even construct your precious camouflage patterned universe.
quotes.translation: 基本实相的本质取决于被直接体验的程度，而唯有通过内在感官的运用才能直接体验。内在感官当然在你们层面与其他任何层面一样被持续运用着。没有这种运用，任何存在都不可能。若没有内在感官无意识且持续的运用，你们甚至无法构建出珍贵的伪装模式宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: So the inner senses and the subconscious can do the same thing as far as inner space, and what you would call inner time, is concerned. But this is not amazing, far from it. It only seems strange because you are so familiar with your precious camouflage patterns. Time and space, dear friends, are both camouflage patterns, therefore the fact that the inner senses can conquer time and space is not, after all, so surprising. To the mind with its subconscious, and to the inner senses, there is no time and space, and therefore to them nothing is conquered. The camouflage is simply not present.
quotes.translation: 因此就内在空间及你们所谓的内在时间而言，内在感官与潜意识也能做到同样的事。但这并不神奇，远非如此。它之所以显得奇特，只因你们太过熟悉珍贵的伪装模式。亲爱的朋友们，时间与空间皆是伪装模式，因此内在感官能超越时空的事实，终究不足为奇。对拥有潜意识的意识体及内在感官而言，时空并不存在，因此对他们而言也谈不上"征服"。伪装根本不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is however one of the most basic, and without it at least two inner senses would be extremely hampered. These two are those concerned with what we may call for now transportation. When we are finally finished with our skeleton outline on the inner senses, then I will go into those that are the most important, basic and necessary. I have not given the inner senses to you in the order of their importance, but merely in the order that would be the simplest for you to understand.
quotes.translation: 然而这是最基本的能力之一，若缺少它，至少两种内在感官将严重受阻。这两种感官涉及我们暂且称为"运输"的功能。待我们完成内在感官的骨架概述后，我将深入探讨那些最重要、最根本且不可或缺的感官。我并非按重要性顺序介绍内在感官，而是以最便于你们理解的顺序呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You cannot see a handful of air though your hands may be full of it. You know its effects, you breathe it constantly, but consciously you do not realize what you are doing. You do not know how air tastes unless you really think hard about it. It is fuel to your physical body and the idea of it comes very close to this fuel of the inner senses, which is not a camouflage effect and which is our vitality unsolidified, or the little wires which make up our imaginary universe. In other words these little wires move along constantly like little individual railway cars carrying fuel, and also are composed of the very fuel themselves.
quotes.translation: 你无法看见满握的空气，虽知它的作用，虽持续呼吸，却未察觉自身行为。除非真正凝神思索，否则不知空气滋味。它是肉身的燃料，而"空气"这个概念极接近内在感官的燃料——这并非伪装效应，而是我们未固化的生命力，或构成想象宇宙的细微导线。换言之，这些导线如满载燃料的微型列车持续运行，同时自身也由燃料构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner senses deal with what actually is. The inner senses are the carriers of our fuel, that is, they can be likened to the various cars of our imaginary train. It takes some doing to be aware of this fuel, since it is so instantly transformed by the outer senses into the stuff of camouflage. The process involved is subconscious. You can hardly catch yourself at it, and yet with training you will be able to catch yourself in the act.
quotes.translation: 内在感官处理的是真实存在。内在感官是燃料的载体，可比喻为想象列车中的各节车厢。要觉察这燃料需费些功夫，因为它会瞬间被外在感官转化为伪装物质。此过程涉及潜意识运作。你几乎无法捕捉到它，但通过训练，你将能在行动中觉察自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As temperatures in various depths of ocean change, and as even the color of the water and of the flora and fauna change, so too in our value climate there are quality changes, and senses equipped to project and perceive the changes. There are distortions because of the limitations of the outer senses, but the inner senses do not distort. The inner senses inhabit directly the atmosphere of our value climate; and they see through the ever varying camouflage patterns, and the flux and flow of apparent change. In our sessions to some small degree you plunge into this ocean of value climate, and to the extent that you are able to divest yourselves of the clothes of camouflage, to that extent can you truly be aware of this climate.
quotes.translation: 正如海洋不同深度的温度变化，甚至海水与动植物的色彩变化，我们的价值气候中也存在品质变化，而感官被赋予投射与感知这些变化的能力。由于外在感官的局限会产生扭曲，但内在感官不会扭曲。内在感官直接栖息于价值气候的氛围中；它们看穿不断变化的伪装模式，以及表象变化的流动与变迁。在我们的课程中，你们已些许潜入这价值气候的海洋，而你们能卸下伪装衣物的程度，正是真正感知此气候的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I risk repeating myself, but I want these steps to be plain. This vital data is sent to the mind by the inner senses. Any material that is important for the body's contact with outer camouflage patterns is given to the brain. The subconscious, so-called, is a connective between mind and brain, between the inner senses and the outer senses. It is actually partly on your plane and partly on other planes. Portions of it do deal with camouflage patterns, with the personal past of the present personality, with racial camouflage memories; and the greater portion belongs to the inner world, and as data comes into it from the inner world, so can it reach far into the inner world itself.
quotes.translation: 我冒着重复的风险，但希望这些步骤清晰明了。这些关键数据由内在感官传递给心智。任何对肉体与外在伪装模式接触重要的资料，都会被传递给大脑。所谓的潜意识，是心智与大脑、内在感官与外在感官之间的连接体。它实际上部分存在于你们的层面，部分存在于其他层面。其中一部分确实处理伪装模式、当前人格的个人过往、以及种族伪装记忆；而更大部分则属于内在世界，当数据从内在世界进入时，它也能深入内在世界本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. Regard the inner senses in connection with the nature of action and electromagnetic reality, for the perceptions of the inner senses are themselves action, and as such they change both the perceiver and the thing perceived. You can see then that even this astral image is always in motion and never static, and its condition alters the physical self even as the physical self acts upon the astral image.
quotes.translation: 现在，请将内在感官与行动及电磁实相的本质联系起来思考，因为内在感官的感知本身就是行动，因此它们既改变感知者，也改变被感知之物。你们便能明白，即使是这个星体形象也始终处于运动之中，绝非静止，其状态改变着物质自体，正如物质自体作用于星体形象一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each reader, therefore, has inner senses, and to some extent uses them constantly, though he is not aware of doing so at an egotistical level. Now, we use the inner senses quite freely and consciously. If you were to do so, then you would perceive the same kind of environment in which I have my existence. You would see an uncamouflaged situation, in which events and form were free and not stuck in a jellylike mold of time. You could see, for example, your present living room not only as a conglomeration of permanent-appearing furniture, but switch your focus and see the immense and constant dance of molecules and other particles that compose the various objects.
quotes.translation: 因此，每位读者都拥有内在感官，并在某种程度上持续运用它们，尽管在自我层面并未察觉。我们则能相当自由且有意识地运用内在感官。若你们也能如此，便会感知到我所存在的同类环境。你们将看见未经伪装的境况，其中事件与形态自由流动，不受制于时间那果冻般的模子。例如，你们不仅能看见客厅里看似永恒的家具组合，更能转换焦点，看见构成各种物体的分子与其他粒子那浩瀚而永恒的舞蹈。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not, however, mean that this is the only reality. It is simply the only reality that you perceive with the physical senses. In order to perceive other realities, you must therefore switch from your outer senses to the inner senses, for the inner senses are clearer, and are equipped to perceive action and reality as it exists independently of the distortions given to it by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 但这并不意味着这是唯一的实相。它只是你们用肉体感官感知到的唯一实相。为了感知其他实相，你们必须从外在感官切换到内在感官，因为内在感官更为清晰，能够感知到独立于肉体感官扭曲之外的行动与实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Mental enzymes are the transformers, and as I have said they are extremely important. I have spoken of the inner and outer senses to make our discussion easier. However you must know by now that there is no actual distinction between inner and outer. The apparent outer senses are merely concerned with the particular camouflage of a particular plane. The inner senses are concerned with vitalities beneath the camouflage. These inner senses, if I may use an analogy again, are like hidden underground trains that carry important fuel from one country to another.
quotes.translation: 心智酵素是转换器，正如我所说，它们极其重要。我提及内在与外在感官是为了让讨论更易理解。但你们此刻必须明白，内在与外在之间并无实际区分。表面的外在感官只关注特定层面的特定伪装。内在感官则关注伪装之下的生命力。若容我再打个比方，这些内在感官就像隐藏的地下列车，将重要燃料从一个国度运往另一个国度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is closely related to one of the inner senses, the second inner sense, and it is upon psychological time that you must try to transpose your inner visions. You can see how handicapped we both are because of the difficulties involved in trying to make you understand inner data in terms of outer data, when the two are so apart, really, even while they are so closely connected. For instance, when I tell you that the second sense is like your sense of time, while this does give you a certain understanding or feeling of what this second sense is like, nevertheless it also is confusing, I know, because you are apt to compare the two too closely.
quotes.translation: 这与内在感官中的第二种——即第二种内在感官——密切相关，你们必须尝试在心理时间中转换内在视像。你们能看出我们双方都因试图用外在资料解释内在资料而受限，尽管两者紧密相连，实则天差地别。例如，当我告诉你第二种感官类似于你们的时间感时，虽然这确实让你对第二种感官有了某种理解或感受，但我知道这也会造成混淆，因为你们容易将两者过度类比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If you will think （I hope） for simplicity's sake of the whole self as it exists on your plane with its physical body, conscious ego and inner self as one field unit, which is also part of the larger or more complete entity as one field unit within another, then perhaps it will not be too much for you to imagine the connection, or one of the connections, between the entity field and the whole-self field, which is on your plane as being the inner senses--that is, the inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
quotes.translation: 为求简便起见，我希望你能将存在于你们层面上的整个自己——包括其肉体、意识自我与内在自己——视为一个场域单元，而这个单元本身又是更大或更完整的存有这个场域单元的一部分。这样或许你就能想象存有场域与你们层面上的整个自己场域之间的连接（或其中一种连接）就是内在感官——也就是说，内在感官是这两个场域之间的连接物之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The most full operation of the inner senses is possible only in this climate. There is so much here that I am impatient to tell you, and so little that you can understand now. Conceptions explode into being, evolve, change into something else, and yet all this within a framework that is definite but cannot be seen or touched by you, the psychological expansion even of atoms and molecules that in themselves contain condensed comprehensions beyond your understanding. The stuff of the universe is not inanimate, nor even on your plane is it an emptiness to be filled, but constantly expanding in ways that you cannot yet fathom.
quotes.translation: 内在感官最充分的运作只可能在这种氛围中发生。这里有太多东西我急于想告诉你们，而你们现在能理解的却如此之少。概念爆发成存在，演化，转变为其他东西，然而这一切都发生在一个明确却无法被你们看见或触摸的框架内——这是原子和分子本身的心理扩张，它们自身就包含着超越你们理解的浓缩领悟。宇宙的物质并非无生命，即使在你们层面上，它也不是一个需要被填充的空虚，而是以你们尚无法理解的方式不断扩张。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: However in some other manners the experiences of the tree are extremely deep, dealing with the inner senses which are, and properly, also properties of freedom. There is something here difficult for me to explain clearly. The inner senses of the tree have strong affinity with the properties of earth itself. They feel their growing. They listen to their growing as you listen to your own heartbeat. They experience this oneness with their own growth, and they also experience pain. The pain however while definite, unpleasant and sometimes agonizing, is not of an emotional nature in the same way that you might experience pain.
quotes.translation: 然而，树在某些其他方面的体验极为深刻，涉及内在感官——这些感官也恰当地是自由的属性。这里有些东西我很难清楚解释。树的内在感官与大地本身的属性有强烈亲和力。它们感受自己的生长。它们倾听自己的生长，就像你们倾听自己的心跳。它们体验与自身生长的合一，也体验痛苦。然而，这种痛苦虽然明确、不愉快、有时甚至令人痛苦，却不像你们可能体验的痛苦那样具有情感性质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The fact remains that the inner senses are equipped to let you perceive inner reality. You can use them; and for Philip's information the evidence of the inner senses is immediate, and vivid, and direct--much more vivid, Philip, than for example your camouflage experience of the color red. Everyone sees red differently. There is no absolute objective red but only gradations of the idea red.
quotes.translation: 事实仍然是，内在感官被设计来让你感知内在实相。你可以使用它们；为了菲利普的参考，内在感官的证据是即时的、生动的、直接的——菲利普，比你对红色的伪装经验要生动得多。每个人都以不同的方式看见红色。没有绝对客观的红色，只有红色概念的渐变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is extremely difficult to go into detail concerning the inner senses, simply because they are un-camouflaged. I do hope to go into detail however, now or later. In some respects the inner senses can be compared to channels on your plane. When continuity is taken into consideration however then the analogy is a poor one, since the word channel seems to imply a more or less permanent opening, and this is not true. One of the marvels of your outer senses is their reach. They actually carry you further ahead, in distance for example, than your physical body may be at any particular time.
quotes.translation: 详细讨论内在感官极其困难，仅仅因为它们是不伪装的。然而，我确实希望现在或以后能详细讨论。在某些方面，内在感官可以比作你们层面上的通道。但若考虑到连续性，这个类比就很拙劣了，因为"通道"一词似乎暗示一个或多或少永久性的开口，而事实并非如此。你们外在感官的奇妙之处之一在于它们的延伸范围。例如，它们实际上能将你带到比你的肉体在任何特定时刻可能到达的更远距离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: However, the inner senses are aware of the body's own physical data at all times, while the outer senses are concerned with the body mainly in its relationship to camouflage environment. In other words the inner senses have an immediate, constant knowledge of the body in a way that the outer senses do not.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在感官始终觉知身体自身的物理数据，而外在感官则主要关注身体与伪装环境的关系。换句话说，内在感官以外在感官所不具备的方式，对身体拥有即时、持续的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You do experience time, but not time as it is bound by your camouflage patterns. As I have mentioned you can in a dream or daydream or through conscious use of psychological time experience many hours in a few clock minutes. This experience comes very close to the third inner sense. If you will remember again our imaginary experience through the inner senses as we looked down at the street, you will remember that I spoke of sensing not only the present essence of the living consciousness within a certain scope, but I also mentioned sensing their past and futures.
quotes.translation: 你们确实体验时间，但并非被你们伪装模式所束缚的时间。如我曾提及，在梦境、白日梦或通过有意识地运用心理时间，你们能在几分钟的时钟时间内体验数小时。这种体验已非常接近第三内在感官。若你们还记得我们通过内在感官俯视街道的想象体验，便会想起我提及不仅感知特定范围内活意识的当下本质，还感知到它们的过去与未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 只有当达到某种程度的自信时，外在自我才能熟悉这些内在运作——至少在你的层面上是如此。否则你们会踉跄跌倒。通常而言，即使整体自体有能力组织所有内在感官的数据，潜意识也很少能全盘接收这类通讯；而专注于伪装模式、实则生来就为处理伪装模式的外在自我，根本承受不了完整内在感官所带来认知冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am not going to hold a very long session this evening. Rather than give you fairly frequent short vacations, I may at times close a session early. We still come out ahead in terms of time. We are heading here indeed, slowly but surely, toward a thorough discussion of the inner senses, which could not be given until you had a good background in the nature of action itself. For you should be able to see now that the inner senses allow a more faithful perception of basic reality than the outer senses could ever give.
quotes.translation: 今晚我不打算进行很长的课。与其频繁给予短暂休息，我有时会提前结束课程。在时间上我们仍然超前。我们正缓慢而坚定地朝着彻底讨论内在感官的方向前进——这必须等你们对行动本质有良好背景认知后才能进行。因为你们现在应该能看出，内在感官比外在感官更能忠实感知基本实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Different outer senses are necessary at different levels and on various planes to interpret the different camouflage patterns. These outer senses are developed to cope with these particular camouflage patterns which the personality will meet in its various environments. The inner senses always operate regardless of the particular environment in which the personality is presently involved. The inner senses provide the whole personality with balance, and enable it to keep in contact with its vitality source.
quotes.translation: 在不同层面和不同境界需要不同的外在感官来诠释不同的伪装模式。这些外在感官是为应对人格在各种环境中会遇到的特定伪装模式而发展出来的。无论人格当前处于何种特定环境，内在感官始终运作。内在感官为整体人格提供平衡，使其能与生命力源头保持联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Using the senses developed on a particular plane to perceive its characteristic camouflage patterns, it is almost impossible to see beyond these boundary effects. The inner senses are inherently equipped to do this, but for many reasons they do not. The appearance of an expanding universe is also caused therefore by this distortive boundary effect, resulting from the interaction of which I have just spoken. In some cases the distortive effect could be likened to the reflection of a solid tree in water.
quotes.translation: 使用在特定层面发展出的感官来感知其特征性的伪装模式时，几乎不可能看穿这些边界效应。内在感官天生具备这种能力，但因诸多原因它们并未如此运作。因此，膨胀宇宙的表象也是由这种扭曲性边界效应造成的——这源于我刚才谈及的互动。在某些情况下，这种扭曲效应可类比为实心树在水中的倒影。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The energy personality who desires to be materialized upon your plane, himself becomes part of this plane through the use of the inner senses. Through a process of diffusion--and this incidentally is our ninth inner sense--the energy personality first diffuses himself into many parts. Since entry into this plane, as a member of this plane, cannot be made in any other manner, it must be made in the simplest terms and be built up on your plane, your sperm being of course an entry in this respect.
quotes.translation: 渴望在你们层面物质化的能量人格，通过运用内在感官使自己成为这个层面的一部分。通过扩散过程——这恰好是我们的第九内在感官——能量人格首先将自身扩散为许多部分。由于进入这个层面（作为该层面的成员）无法以其他方式进行，必须以最基础的形式进入并在你们层面逐步构建，你们的精子在此方面当然就是一种入口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All of the inner senses are not utilized to the same degree on any plane. Many planes are given over to the training in the use of one or two of the most important inner senses. I liked the analogy of the spider and his web because it is such a simple and uncomplicated example of camouflage construction, divorced from intermediaries such as ego or tools.
quotes.translation: 所有内在感官在任何层面上都不会被同等程度地运用。许多层面专门用于训练使用一两个最重要的内在感官。我喜欢蜘蛛与蛛网的比喻，因为它如此简单明了地展示了伪装建构的范例，且不受自我或工具等中介物的干扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner senses in other words are the means, the mental enzymes are the tools, and the vitality is the actual material that forms the universe as a whole, the apparent divisions within it, the apparent boundaries of the various divisions, and the diverse materials within each division. Again, the different materials within each division are only camouflages formed by the inner senses upon the material itself.
quotes.translation: 换言之，内在感官是手段，心灵酵素是工具，而生命力则是构成整个宇宙的实际材料——包括宇宙内部明显的区分、各区分间的明显界限，以及每个区分内的多样物质。再次强调，每个区分内的不同物质，只是内在感官作用于物质本身所形成的伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The table, and I'm afraid this is somewhat review, Joseph, the table as you know is not solid. Your scientists know this. Your outer senses lie when they experience the table as solid. You know this. The inner senses are not so deceived, and never have been. The inner senses experience directly the reality of which your matter is composed.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，恐怕这有些重复了——桌子，如你所知，并非固体。你们的科学家也明白这点。当你们的外在感官将桌子体验为固体时，它们在说谎。你清楚这点。内在感官则不会被如此欺骗，也从未被欺骗过。内在感官直接体验构成你们物质的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again, the impressions received by the inner senses are actually concrete in a way that you do not yet understand. This data also has physical effects upon the brain. In the same manner that impressions received from outside stimuli affect the brain, they make their impression upon it. They change the personality as any experience changes a personality. To insist upon evidence in terms of outside sensual data is as ridiculous a notion as to expect a camera to play music.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，内在感官接收的印象实际上以一种你们尚未理解的方式具体存在。这些数据同样对大脑产生物理影响。就像来自外界刺激的印象会影响大脑一样，它们也会在大脑上留下印记。它们会改变人格，正如任何经历都会改变人格。坚持以外在感官数据作为证据，就像期待相机能演奏音乐一样荒谬。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The grouping of inner senses with which we are now concerned deal with the disentanglement of one set of camouflage patterns and the taking up of another set. The groupings of inner senses most dependent upon the use of psychological time are those which involve a nearly complete disentanglement from camouflage pattern, without taking on other patterns, and these are perhaps the most important because they come closer to the direct experience of unveiled reality.
quotes.translation: 我们目前关注的内在感官群组，涉及从一组伪装模式中解脱并进入另一组模式。最依赖心理时间运用的内在感官群组，是那些近乎完全脱离伪装模式而不进入其他模式的——这些或许最为重要，因为它们更接近对未遮蔽实相的直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We will cover your experiences at another session. I am sorry to put you off, but tonight was an excellent night to give you the material we have covered; and I want to explain your experiences rather thoroughly, and also use them to delve further into our study of the inner senses. You have been doing particularly well, however. I told you that direct experience through the inner senses would be extremely vivid, and now you can realize this for yourself.
quotes.translation: 我们将在另一节课讨论你的经历。很抱歉推迟了，但今晚是提供我们已涵盖材料的绝佳时机；我想更透彻地解释你的经历，并借此深入我们对内在感官的研究。不过你一直做得特别好。我曾告诉你，通过内在感官的直接体验会极其生动，现在你可以亲自体会到了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner senses, though I have in the past described them by separating their functions and characteristics, basically operate together in such a way that in your terms it would be highly difficult to separate one from the others. They function with a perfect spontaneous order, aware of all synchronicities. In that psychological universe, then, it is possible for entities "to be everywhere at once," aware of everything at once. Your world is composed of such "entities"--the units of consciousness that form your body. The kinds of conscious minds that you have cannot hold that kind of information.
quotes.translation: 内在感官，虽然我过去曾通过区分它们的功能和特性来描述它们，但基本上它们是一起运作的，以至于以你们的说法，很难将其中一个与另一个分开。它们以完美的自发秩序运作，知晓所有的同时性。在那个心理宇宙中，因此，实体有可能“同时无处不在”，同时知晓一切。你们的世界就是由这样的“实体”组成的——那些构成你们身体的意识单位。你们所拥有的那种意识心智无法容纳那种信息。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The basic consciousness is never physical. Yet within your system it must collect experience within the physical system, hence the physical body. But experience itself is not physical, and cannot be contained within physical matter. Therefore this experience, collected within the physical field, is held in codified form by this inner self or astral identity. It is only by understanding the connection between the physical and nonphysical self, and the communication systems that operate here, that the true nature of human personality can be studied. While we are dealing now with your own species, it should be realized that all consciousness also possesses its own astral identity. The inner senses are part of this nonphysical self. They allow the personality to retain its relationship with nonphysical reality, permitting the material self to focus within its earthly environment.
quotes.translation: 基本意识从来不是物质的。然而，在你们的系统内，它必须在物质系统内收集经验，因此才有了物质身体。但经验本身不是物质的，也无法被包含在物质之中。因此，这种在物质领域收集的经验，以编码形式被这个内在自体或星光体身份所持有。只有通过理解物质与非我之间的连接，以及在此运作的沟通系统，才能研究人类人格的真实本质。虽然我们现在处理的是你们自己的物种，但应该认识到，所有意识也拥有其自身的星光体身份。内在感官是这非我的一部分。它们允许人格保持与非物质实相的关系，同时让物质自体聚焦在其尘世环境中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This involves, to begin with, an almost impossible task. Data from the inner senses is vivid, it is reliable, it makes an impression upon the conscious individual. It is your insistence upon translating this material into physical terms that causes your difficulty. You do not insist upon seeing, feeling or touching a psychological experience, and yet you do not say that a psychological experience does not exist because you cannot hold it in both hands.
quotes.translation: 这首先涉及一个几乎不可能的任务。来自内在感官的数据是生动的、可靠的，它给有意识的个体留下印象。是你们坚持将这些资料翻译成物质术语，才导致了你们的困难。你们并不坚持去看、去感觉或去触摸一个心理经验，然而你们也不会说一个心理经验不存在，因为你们无法用双手握住它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner senses belong to you as inhibitors of a spontaneous inner reality universe. They, the inner senses, are your regardless of the particular camouflage plane you might inhabit at any given instance. Only by using the inner senses can you perceive while on your plane the inner reality of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 内在感官属于你们，作为自发内在实相宇宙的抑制者。它们，这些内在感官，是你们的，无论你们在任何特定时刻可能栖居于哪个特定的伪装层面。只有通过使用内在感官，你们才能在你们的层面上感知到它所属的内在实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 现在，这个感官，就像所有其他内在感官一样，正被内在自我意识自我所使用，但外在自我不被允许沿着这些路线觉知。来自这些内在感官的最少量信息，在通过潜意识筛选后，才被给予外在自我。但只是最少量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: On your plane such transformations are carried on without the awareness of the ego with which you are familiar, and therefore other mechanisms become necessary. On some planes the inner senses are the only senses, because all other necessities vanish since the inner senses function at greatest capacity.
quotes.translation: 在你们的层面上，这种转化是在你们所熟悉的自我的觉知之外进行的，因此其他机制变得必要。在某些层面上，内在感官是唯一的感官，因为所有其他需求都消失了，因为内在感官以最大能力运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream data was correct in its bare essentials. Your friend, Miss Callahan, said that she was going away, and that she did not really want to go away. The picture in the dream was partly subconscious guesswork with a touch of clairvoyance. Any such inner communications are basically the same in that they are picked up by the inner senses, whether or not the information is received as a telepathic communication or in terms of clairvoyance. Where a place for example is seen, rather than words being heard, is determined by the receiver of the message.
quotes.translation: 梦境数据在基本要点上是正确的。你的朋友卡拉汉小姐说她将要离开，而她其实并不想离开。梦中的画面部分是潜意识的猜测，带有一丝千里眼成分。任何这类内在沟通本质上都是相同的，因为它们都是由内在感官接收的，无论信息是以心电感应还是千里眼的方式被接收。例如，当看到某个地点而非听到话语时，这取决于信息的接收者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again, your elements, those that you know and those that you will discover, and the elements you will create, are only camouflages of the basic stuff or vitality, which you will not discover with your outer senses. Your scientists will discover that their tools are no longer adequate. Because man has such a sense of curiosity the scientists on your plane will be forced finally to use their own inner senses. Otherwise they will be dealing with camouflage only, and find themselves in a blind alley. Not because their eyes are closed, but because they are not using the right set of eyes. You will come no closer to knowledge of the fifth dimension until you use the inner senses as tools of perception.
quotes.translation: 再说一次，你们的元素——那些你们已知的、将要发现的以及你们将创造的元素——只是基本材料或活力的伪装，你们无法用外在感官发现它们。你们的科学家会发现他们的工具不再足够。因为人类有如此强烈的好奇心，你们层面的科学家最终将被迫使用自己的内在感官。否则他们只会处理伪装，并发现自己陷入死胡同。这不是因为他们闭上了眼睛，而是因为他们没有使用正确的眼睛。除非你们将内在感官作为感知工具，否则你们无法更接近第五维度的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner senses are actually the channels through which the entire composition of any particular plane is appreciated and actually maintained. It is through the inner senses that the mental enzymes are enabled to act upon the vitality which is, as I have said, the structure of the universe itself.
quotes.translation: 内在感官实际上是通道，通过它们，任何特定层面的整体构成得以被感知并实际上得以维持。正是通过内在感官，精神酶才能作用于活力——正如我所说，这活力就是宇宙本身的结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your scientists' idea of an expanding universe is so dependent upon your own limited theories that it becomes very difficult to make the matter plain. Again I entreat you to practice with the use of psychological time, for here the inner senses are given the greatest freedom from camouflage. And experiencing the resulting inner expansion, you will perhaps come somewhat closer to the ideas involved in our real expanding universe.
quotes.translation: 你们科学家关于宇宙膨胀的观念如此依赖于你们有限的理论，以至于很难把问题说清楚。我再次恳请你们练习使用心理时间，因为在这里内在感官能最大程度地摆脱伪装。通过体验由此产生的内在扩展，你们或许能更接近我们真实膨胀宇宙所涉及的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner senses provide their own "transportation," and put that in quotes. Transportation as such is valid only within a space framework and within a time concept, such as those on your own plane. The "transportation" （in quotes） of the inner senses consists mainly of what you might call a changing of frequencies or vibrations or pulsations, a transformation of vitality-form from one particular pattern or aspect to another.
quotes.translation: 内在感官提供它们自己的"交通工具"，请加上引号。交通工具本身只在空间框架和时间概念内有效，比如你们自己层面的情况。内在感官的"交通工具"（带引号）主要包括你们可称之为频率、振动或脉动的改变，即活力形式从一种特定模式或面向到另一种的转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As individual reliance upon the outer senses develops, the personality to a large degree relies upon them, and gradually loses the habit of relying upon the more familiar inner senses utilized mainly in infancy and childhood. This is usually a matter of practicality; yet there are those who continue stubbornly this older and basic reliance upon the inner senses, and these individuals utilize the realization of an open system.
quotes.translation: 随着个体对外在感官的依赖逐渐发展，人格在很大程度上依赖它们，并逐渐失去依赖主要在婴儿期和童年期使用的更熟悉的内在感官的习惯。这通常是实用性的问题；然而，也有一些人固执地继续这种对内在感官的更古老、更基本的依赖，这些个体利用了对开放系统的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Within him there are methods of perception that allow him to see through the camouflage settings, to see beyond the stage. He uses these inner senses constantly, though the actor part of himself is so intent upon the play that this escapes him. In a large manner, the physical senses actually form the physical reality they seem to only perceive. They are themselves part of the camouflage, but they are like lenses over your natural inner perceptions that force you to "see" an available field of activity as physical matter; and so they can be relied upon only to tell you what is happening in a superficial manner. You can tell the position of the other actors for example, or time by clock, but these physical senses will not tell you that time is itself a camouflage, or that consciousness forms the other actors, or that realities that you cannot see exist over and beyond the physical matter that is so apparent.
quotes.translation: 在他之内存在着多种感知方法，使他能够看穿伪装设定，看透舞台之外。他不断运用这些内在感官，尽管他作为演员的那部分自我过于专注于戏剧而忽略了这一点。从广义上说，物质感官实际上形成了它们似乎仅仅感知到的物质实相。它们本身就是伪装的一部分，但就像覆盖在你自然内在感知上的透镜，迫使你将可用的活动场域"看"成物质；因此，你只能依靠它们告诉你表面层次上发生的事情。例如，你可以知道其他演员的位置，或通过时钟知道时间，但这些物质感官不会告诉你时间本身就是一种伪装，或意识形成了其他演员，或你无法看到的实相存在于如此明显的物质之外。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Direct cognition is an inner sense. In physical terms you might call it remote sensing. Your physical body, and your physical existence, are based upon certain kinds of direct cognition, and it is responsible for the very functioning of the reasoning mind itself. Scientists like to say that animals operate through simple instinctive behavior, without will or volition: It is no accomplishment for a spider to make its web, a beaver its dam, a bird its nest, because according to such reasoning, such creatures cannot perform otherwise. The spider must spin his web. If he chooses not to, he will not survive. But by that same reasoning--to which, of course, I do not subscribe--you should also add that man can take no credit either for his intellect, since man must think, and cannot help doing so.
quotes.translation: 直接认知是一种内在感官。用物质术语来说，你可能称之为遥感。你的物质身体和物质存在都基于某种直接认知，而它正是理性思维本身运作的基础。科学家喜欢说动物通过简单的本能行为运作，没有意志或意愿：蜘蛛织网、河狸筑坝、鸟儿筑巢都不算成就，因为按照这种推理，这些生物别无选择。蜘蛛必须织网。如果它选择不织，就无法生存。但按照同样的推理——当然我并不赞同——你也应该补充说，人类也不能因其智力而居功，因为人类必须思考，而且无法不思考。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时应用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前就意识到危险。内在自我关注维持整个自我的基础与平衡——这非常重要——并且对来自整体存有的讯息保持开放。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并意识到那些外在自我因其专门化而无法承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我应该在一定程度上代表仍居于潜意识中的次主导人格。当外在自我狭隘且未能充分代表这些次主导人格时，它们就会奋起反抗，并在条件有利时试图通过主导自我的短暂弱点来表达自己。但即使不这样做，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）来表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The material is delivered to the body, as I have said, from the inner world by means of these inner senses. This inner reality data is received by the mind. This is extremely important. The mind, being un-camouflaged, is the receiving station for the data brought to it by the inner senses. What you almost have here is an inner nervous and communication system closely resembling the outer systems with which you are familiar.
quotes.translation: 如我所说，物质通过内在感官从内在世界传递给身体。这些内在实相数据由心智接收。这一点极为重要。心智作为非伪装的存在，是接收内在感官所传递数据的接收站。你这里几乎拥有一个内在神经系统和沟通系统，与你熟悉的外在系统极为相似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I do not mean to mislead you. Basic reality is not by nature terrifying. It is however vibrant and direct to the extreme, and you must be prepared before you experience such an ultrasonic action. A direct experience of reality involves complete use of all the inner senses to an integrated cognizance field. A very weak analogy can be found if you imagine at one time hearing the most exciting and moving music imaginable, while simultaneously smelling the strongest but not necessarily unpleasant odor, viewing the most emotionally-charged scene while feeling intense and vivid bodily sensations. In normal life you even turn down outer-sense stimuli for the sake of simplicity, and to enable you to focus upon those stimuli close at hand.
quotes.translation: 我无意误导你。基本实相本质上并不可怕。然而它极度充满活力且直接，你必须做好准备才能体验这种超音速般的运作。对实相的直接体验涉及所有内在感官的完全运用，达到一个整合的认知场域。如果你想象同时听到最激动人心、最动人的音乐，闻到最强烈但不一定令人不快的味道，观看最充满情感的场景，同时感受强烈而生动的身体感觉，就能找到一个非常薄弱的类比。在正常生活中，你甚至为了简化而调低外在感官刺激，以便专注于手边的刺激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Projections involve many more aspects of the whole self, and are a mark that the personality is progressing in important ways. The inner senses are allowed their greatest freedom in projection states, and the whole self retains experience that it would not otherwise. When this knowledge becomes part of the usual waking consciousness, that is when you realize what you have done, then you have taken a gigantic step forward.
quotes.translation: 投射涉及整个自我的更多面向，是人格以重要方式进步的标志。在投射状态中，内在感官获得最大自由，整个自我保留否则无法获得的经验。当这种知识成为通常清醒意识的一部分——即当你意识到自己做了什么时——那么你就迈出了巨大的一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner senses are equipped to perceive data that is not physical. They are not deceived by the images that you project in three-dimensional reality. Now, they can perceive physical objects. Your physical senses are extensions of these inner methods of perception, and after death it is upon these that you will rely. They are used in out-of-body experiences. They operate constantly beneath normal waking consciousness...
quotes.translation: 内在感官能够感知非实质性的资料。它们不会被你在三维实相中投射的影像所欺骗。它们也能感知物质物体。你的外在感官是这些内在感知方法的延伸，死亡之后你将依赖的正是这些内在感官。它们被用于出体经验，在正常清醒意识之下持续运作……
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The physical senses are the extensions of inner senses 3 that are, in one way or another, a part of each physical species regardless of its degree. The inner senses provide all species with an inner method of communication. The c-e-l-l-s (spelled out), then, possess inner senses.
quotes.translation: 外在感官是内在感官的延伸，无论程度如何，这些内在感官都以某种方式成为每个物质物种的一部分。内在感官为所有物种提供内在的沟通方法。因此，细胞也拥有内在感官。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As temperatures in various depths of ocean change, and as even the color of the water and of the flora and fauna change, so too in our value climate there are quality changes, and senses equipped to project and perceive the changes. There are distortions because of the limitations of the outer senses, but the inner senses1 do not distort. The inner senses inhabit directly the atmosphere of our value climate; they see through the ever-varying camouflage (physical) patterns, and the flux and flow of apparent change. To some small degree in our sessions you plunge into this ocean of value climate, and to the extent that you are able to divest yourselves of the clothes of camouflage, you can be truly aware of this climate.
quotes.translation: 如同海洋不同深度的温度变化，甚至水色与动植物的色彩变化，在我们的价值气候中也有品质的变化，并存在专门投射与感知这些变化的感官。由于外在感官的限制会产生扭曲，但内在感官不会扭曲。内在感官直接栖息于我们价值气候的氛围中；它们能看穿不断变化的伪装（物质）模式，以及表面变化的流动与变迁。在我们的课中，你们已稍微潜入这价值气候的海洋，当你们能卸下伪装的衣物时，便能真正觉察到这种气候。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: When, or by the time that transportation difficulties are solved, you will no longer need transportation. Use of the inner senses makes transportation as you think of it completely unnecessary, since complete use of the inner senses amounts to communication to a degree so near perfect and so independent of so-called space, that transportation through space in those terms becomes an outmoded method of communication.
quotes.translation: 当交通难题被解决之时，或到那时，你们将不再需要交通工具。运用内在感官会使你们所认为的交通变得完全多余，因为完全运用内在感官等于达到近乎完美的沟通程度，且完全独立于所谓的空间，以致于以那些术语定义的穿越空间的交通，将成为过时的沟通方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner senses allow you to follow some of these actions into other realities. The moment point on the one hand is of course a minute division of action. On the other hand it is an entrance into unknown possibilities and new dimensions. As you probe into any given moment point, you automatically become a part of it and change it accordingly as it makes its impressions upon you. These interchanging's occur on many levels: psychologically, chemically, electromagnetically, psychically. There are subtle variations, as you know, in your known self from one instant to another as you affect your physical environment and form it, and as it in turn forms you. And this is just on the physical level.
quotes.translation: 内在感官让你能跟随某些行动进入其他实相。一方面，瞬间点当然是行动的细微划分；另一方面，它是通往未知可能性与新维度的入口。当你探索任何特定瞬间点时，你自动成为它的一部分，并在它对你产生印象时相应改变它。这些交互作用发生在许多层面：心理的、化学的、电磁的、灵性的。如你所知，在你影响并塑造物质环境、同时环境也塑造你的过程中，你的已知自我从一瞬到另一瞬存在细微变化——而这还只是物质层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Individuals are always warned of disasters, so that the organism can prepare itself ahead of time. The day of death is known. Consciously such knowledge is not given to the ego for obvious reasons, but every organism, through its inner senses, is equipped with subconscious knowledge of personal disasters, deaths, and so forth, the personality itself deciding beforehand what it considers disastrous; and the members of the species as a whole know in advance of their wars. As telepathy operates constantly at a subconscious level, as a basis for all language and communication, so clairvoyance operates continually so that the physical organism can prepare itself to face its challenges.
quotes.translation: 个体总会收到灾难的预警，以便有机体能提前准备。死亡之日是已知的。出于明显原因，这种知识不会刻意给予自我，但每个有机体通过其内在感官，都具备对个人灾难、死亡等的潜意识知识——人格本身会预先决定什么被视为灾难；而整个物种的成员会提前知晓战争。正如心灵感应持续在潜意识层面运作，作为所有语言与沟通的基础，千里眼也持续运作，使物质有机体能准备好面对其挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Yet you are more limited than this by far. It is important for the race of men now to begin to use and experiment with the inner senses, since for the potentialities of humanity to be fully realized, new concepts must arise which cannot arise in the limited scope he now permits himself. Because the cells and molecules in general have consciousness, because they contain within themselves a capsule comprehension of the universe as a whole, and because they contain the ability to form into an almost infinite variety of form, there is a kinship between every atom and molecule, a basic enduring connection, regardless of the separate appearance which is seen using the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 然而你们所受的限制远大于此。现在人类种族必须开始运用并实验内在感官，因为若要充分实现人类的潜能，就必须产生新的概念，而这些概念无法在人类目前容许自己的有限范围内产生。由于细胞和分子普遍具有意识，由于它们自身包含对宇宙整体的胶囊式理解，也由于它们具备形成几乎无限多样形态的能力，每个原子和分子之间都存在着亲缘关系，一种基本而持久的连结，无论使用外在感官所见的分离表象如何。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When children dream, they utilize these inner senses as adults do, and then through dreaming they learn to translate such material into the precise framework of the exterior senses. Children's games are always "in the present" -- that is, they are immediately experienced, though the play events may involve the future or the past. The phrase "once upon a time" is strongly evocative and moving, even to adults, because children play with time in a way that adults have forgotten. If you want to sense the motion of your psyche, it is perhaps easiest to imagine a situation either in the past or the future, for this automatically moves your mental sense-perceptions in a new way.
quotes.translation: 当孩子做梦时，他们像成人一样运用这些内在感官，然后通过梦境学习将这些材料转化为外在感官的精确框架。孩子们的游戏总是"活在当下"——也就是说，尽管游戏事件可能涉及未来或过去，它们都是被立即体验的。"很久很久以前"这个短语具有强烈的唤起力和感染力，甚至对成人也是如此，因为孩子们以成人已遗忘的方式玩弄时间。如果你想要感知你心灵的运动，或许最容易的方法是想象一个过去或未来的情境，因为这会自动以新的方式移动你的心智感官知觉。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You remember that I listed briefly the three forms that you use during your projections. Now I will also say that in the first form you usually use certain inner senses; in the second form you use more of these, you see, and in the third form you make an attempt to use all of them, though very rarely is this successful. You should find it interesting, when you note waking or dream projections, to notice the overall form of perception that you seem to be using. You will automatically shield yourself in a large measure from stimuli that is too strong for your own rate of development. This balancing attempt may lead to an unevenness of experience during any given projection.
quotes.translation: 你记得我曾简要列出你在投射过程中使用的三种形态。现在我要补充说，在第一种形态中你通常使用某些内在感官；在第二种形态中你使用更多内在感官，你看，而在第三种形态中你试图使用所有内在感官，尽管极少成功。当你注意到清醒或梦境投射时，应该会很有趣地观察你似乎正在使用的整体感知形态。你会自动在很大程度上屏蔽那些对你自身发展速率来说过于强烈的刺激。这种平衡尝试可能导致任何特定投射过程中的经验不均匀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I wanted to say a little more about duration, as far as communication from the inner senses are concerned. As I said, duration can be experienced in relation to psychological time and within its framework. The important thing here, and I'm afraid the difficult thing for you here, is the relaxation of the mind from clock time. And this is a freedom which you can and should allow yourself in such instances.
quotes.translation: 关于内在感官沟通的持续时间，我想再多说一点。如我所说，持续时间可以在心理时间的框架内被体验。这里的关键——恐怕对你们来说困难之处——在于让心智从时钟时间中放松。这是一种你们在这种情境下能够且应该允许自己拥有的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the data from the inner senses is ignored the personalities then become so intertwined with the camouflage pattern that they are only capable of drawing upon a very limited amount of the vitality which gives them basic energy and strength. This happens more usually than not in such culturally-oriented levels as your own, where the camouflage pattern becomes extremely complicated and imprisoning.
quotes.translation: 当内在感官的数据被忽视时，人格就会与幻相模式如此纠缠，以至于只能汲取非常有限的生命力——而这生命力本应给予他们基本能量与力量。在像你们这样以文化为导向的层面上，这种情况通常会发生，因为幻相模式变得极其复杂且具有禁锢性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: To the extent that you are able to allow yourselves to be aware of data received by the inner senses, you are preparing yourself and are that far ahead. You remember, Joseph, the rather frightening sensation you felt during one instance of your use of one inner sense, when you translated inner data into the almost nightmare picture of open mouths that could not scream. This is but a minute instance.
quotes.translation: 你们越能让自己意识到内在感官接收的数据，就越是在为自己做准备，并领先一步。约瑟，你记得有一次运用某个内在感官时，将内在数据转化为几乎噩梦般的画面——张开的嘴巴却无法尖叫——那种相当骇人的感觉。这不过是一个微小的实例。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This of course highly falsifies such data. The inner senses are not bound by those root assumptions however. This is why many psychic or subjective experiences seem to contradict physical laws. Inner experience often seems chaotic or meaningless because you attempt to interpret it according to the root assumptions of physical reality. You must learn the laws that apply to other systems.
quotes.translation: 这当然严重扭曲了这类资料。然而，内在感官并不受那些根本假设的束缚。这就是为什么许多通灵或主观体验似乎与物理法则相矛盾。内在体验常常显得混乱或毫无意义，因为你试图根据物质实相的根本假设来诠释它。你必须学习适用于其他系统的法则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Since you both are tiring I will end this session. The one point I would like to make, first, is this: Conscious fear is usually the main hindrance as far as data from the inner senses is concerned. Therefore, a realization that these senses belong to you and are quite natural will help you avoid the otherwise unavoidable, almost automatic closing off of such data by the consciousness.
quotes.translation: 既然你们俩都累了，我就结束这一节。不过我想先指出一点：就内在感官的资料而言，有意识的恐惧通常是主要的障碍。因此，认识到这些感官属于你且十分自然，将有助于你避免意识几乎自动关闭这类资料的情况——否则这种关闭是不可避免的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is only the inner senses which will give you any evidence at all of the basic nature of life itself. Since very often the vitality or stuff of the universe seems as innocuous as air might seem to you, then look for what you do not see. Explore places that appear empty, for they are full. Look between events. What you see clearly with your outer senses is camouflage. I am not suggesting that you take everything on faith, nothing of the sort. I am saying that what seems vacant lacks camouflage, and therefore if this is explored it will yield evidence. I hope I have not carried you too far too fast.
quotes.translation: 只有内在感官才能为你提供任何关于生命本身基本性质的证据。既然宇宙的生命力或基质常常像空气对你而言那样无害，那么就去寻找你看不见的东西。探索看似空旷的地方，因为它们其实充满。观察事件之间的空隙。你用外在感官清晰看到的是伪装。我并非建议你全凭信心接受一切，绝非如此。我是说，看似空无的地方缺乏伪装，因此如果加以探索，就会显现证据。希望我没有让你们走得太快太远。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式根据某些法则演化。它们仅仅反映了背后的理念，而你必须认识到这些理念源自不同来源。它们确实源于潜意识，但在此之前，一种理念特质被内在感官接收。有时这种理念特质作为直觉被接收，从而火花般进入意识心智。但意识自我是伪装模式的主要操控者和显见的推动者。构成伪装模式的实际材料是存在的生命力，它被你们的人格无意识地使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am not going to keep you too long this evening in any case. However I do want to mention the fact that the inner senses are capable of expansion and of focus in a way that the outer senses are not. They simply extend further, though I am speaking now in your terms rather than my own. And as to where the inner world actually is on your plane, I will go into that at our next session.
quotes.translation: 无论如何，今晚我不会让你们久留。不过，我确实想提一个事实：内在感官能够以外在感官所不能的方式扩展和聚焦。它们只是延伸得更远，尽管我现在是用你们的说法而非我自己的。至于内在世界在你们层面上的实际位置，我们下次课再深入探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What you experienced is difficult to explain until we have a thorough discussion of the inner senses, however I will give you a somewhat superficial explanation for now. What you experienced was an onrush, or should I say onslaught, of data in its pure form, rushing through the inner senses like a wind in kaleidoscope, because you did not know how to control or disentangle the data.
quotes.translation: 你经历的体验很难解释，除非我们彻底讨论内在感官，不过我现在先给你一个较为肤浅的解释。你经历的是纯粹形式资料的涌入，或应说是冲击，像万花筒中的风一样通过内在感官奔涌而来，因为你不知道如何控制或理清这些资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I want to make this clearer however. Suppose that you suddenly understand the concept of oneness with the universe, and that this particular inner sense of feeling concepts is to be used. You would then construct, as you construct dream images, a multitudinous variety of shapes and forms meant to represent the complicated varieties of life. You would then have the experience of entering into each of these lives. You would not think what it was like to be a bird, you would momentarily be a bird. This does involve a projection of sorts, and yet it still must be called a pseudo projection.
quotes.translation: 不过我想把这点说得更清楚些。假设你突然领悟了与宇宙合一的这个概念，而这份特定的内在感觉概念感将被运用。那么你就会像构建梦境意象那样，构建出无数种形态与形式，用以代表生命的复杂多样性。接着你会体验进入每一种生命形态。你不会思考"成为一只鸟是什么感觉"，而是会瞬间成为一只鸟。这确实涉及某种投射，但仍必须称之为伪投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The fourth inner sense is the conceptual sense. Now you think of a concept in terms of an idea, which you can only understand in intellectual terms. However, the fourth inner sense involves again direct cognition, only now of a concept in much more than you would call intellectual terms; It involves experiencing a concept completely, to the extent of being a concept completely.
quotes.translation: 第四种内在感官是概念感官。现在你们把概念理解为一种想法，只能通过智性层面来理解。然而第四种内在感官涉及的仍是直接认知，只是此时对概念的认知远超你们所谓的智性层面；它意味着完整地体验一个概念，甚至达到完全成为那个概念的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The voice mechanism, unfortunately, is something that we must work with, and to get my own personality across through the female image and vocal chords, certain adjustments must be made. Beyond this, however, as I have mentioned before in class, it is not out of the inner sense of my invisible heart, but out of the depths of your own psychologies that you make me into a wise old man, and project upon me the authority images that lurk in your own minds. I have always tried to keep you from making this error, and sought to release from within yourselves your own abilities.
quotes.translation: 遗憾的是，声音机制是我们必须处理的问题。要让我的个性通过这位女性形象和声带传达出来，必须进行某些调整。但除此之外，正如我课堂上曾说过的，并非出于我无形之心的内在感官，而是源于你们自身心理的深处，你们才把我塑造成智慧长者，并将潜藏于自己心智中的权威形象投射到我身上。我一直试图阻止你们犯这个错误，并寻求从你们内在释放出自身的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Any such communications coming through the inner senses will exist in your psychological time. I have said also that this psychological time operates during sleep and during quiet times of consciousness. Now in dreams and in the dream framework you have the feeling of experiencing many hours, or even days. These days or hours that you seem to experience in dreams are not recorded by the physical body, and are outside of your physical time camouflage. If in a dream for example you experience within the framework two days, physically you do not age for these two days.
quotes.translation: 任何通过内在感官获得的这类信息，都将存在于你们的心理时间中。我也曾说过，这种心理时间在睡眠和意识宁静时刻运作。在梦境与梦的架构中，你们会感觉经历了数小时甚至数天。这些在梦中似乎经历的时日，肉体并未记录，且处于你们物理时间伪装之外。例如在梦境架构中经历两天，肉体并不会因此衰老两天。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The objects that you will see and the places that you will visit, in dream or out-of-body experiences, are basically as real as any physical object or location, because neither are basically real. Nor of course are they unreal. As soon as you begin to translate an idea you are distorting it. The inner senses you see do not distort the data, but when you attempt to make such data available to the ego, then distortion to some extent must enter in.
quotes.translation: 在梦境或出体体验中，你们将看到的物体与造访的地点，本质上与任何物理物体或地点同样真实，因为两者本质上都不真实。当然它们也并非不真实。一旦开始翻译某个概念，你们就在扭曲它。你们看，内在感官本身不会扭曲资料，但当你们试图让自我获取这些资料时，就必然会产生某种程度的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is your refusal to accept the whole self that causes the difficulty. Once more: Data received by the inner senses is as vivid, and in fact more vivid, than any other data you will ever receive, and the ironic part of the whole matter is that you actually receive this inner data constantly. You utilize it constantly and yet consciously you will not accept its existence.
quotes.translation: 正是你们拒绝接纳完整自体才造成了困难。再次重申：内在感官接收到的信息，比你们将接收的任何其他信息都更生动——事实上更为生动。整件事的讽刺之处在于，你们实际上持续接收着这些内在信息，持续运用着它们，却在意识层面拒绝承认其存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In some ways you see, your dream world is actually much closer to the direct experience of reality than is your waking world, where the operation of the inner senses is shielded so from your own awareness. This is not to say that the dream world is more important to you in your present situation, merely that it contains more truth about the source of your own existence.
quotes.translation: 从某些方面来说，你的梦境世界实际上比清醒世界更接近对实相的直接体验，因为在清醒世界中，内在感官的运作被屏蔽于你的觉知之外。这并非说梦境世界在你当前处境中更重要，只是它包含更多关于你自身存在源头的真相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I intend to go into more material about various planes, and soon to give a comprehensive view of the inner senses and their mechanism and operation. If this is not too much for you I will add this: that the inner senses would correspond to the outer senses of the inner hidden self-conscious self, that is, separated by the subconscious from your ordinary conscious self.
quotes.translation: 我打算深入探讨关于不同层面的更多资料，并很快给出关于内在感官及其机制与运作的全面观点。如果这对你来说不算太过，我将补充这一点：内在感官相当于内在隐藏的自我意识自我的外在感官，也就是说，通过潜意识与你的普通意识自我分隔开来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The fact is that when you insist upon evidence through the outside, regularly accepted senses, that you almost automatically turn off the inner sense apparatus. This is not necessary. Man to a large degree has set up this habit reaction. It is not a natural habit reaction. You must take the inner data at its face value, and this is what you will not do. Once you take this first step of spontaneity, you will actually receive evidence that even your conscious mind will be forced to accept. But the first step of such willingness must be made.
quotes.translation: 事实是，当你坚持通过外在的、通常被接受的感官获取证据时，你几乎会自动关闭内在感官装置。这并非必要。人类在很大程度上建立了这种习惯性反应。这不是一种自然的习惯性反应。你必须以表面价值接受内在资料，而这是你做不到的。一旦你迈出这自发性的一步，你实际上会收到连你的意识心智都不得不接受的证据。但必须迈出这意愿的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Before we close I want to mention the importance of the third inner sense with the experience of concept patterns. The third inner sense, involving what you would call perception of past, present and future, is the sense that enables the inner ego and entities to experience direct concept-patterns, and free them therefore from successive cause and effect limitations.
quotes.translation: 在结束之前，我想提及第三个内在感官在概念模式体验中的重要性。第三个内在感官，涉及你所谓的对过去、现在和未来的感知，是使内在自我和存有能够直接体验概念模式的感官，从而使它们摆脱连续的因果限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Einstein used the miraculous aspects of his mind. Parts of the mind are almost completely undistorted. The mind is distributed throughout the whole physical body. The mind builds up about it the physical camouflages necessary for existence on your physical plane. The mind receives data from the inner senses and forms the camouflage necessary. The mind unconsciously or unselfconsciously deals with the basic laws according to the camouflage effect that is vital for survival on your physical plane. The mind is the tool which must be used.
quotes.translation: 爱因斯坦运用了他心智的神奇方面。心智的某些部分几乎完全未被扭曲。心智遍布整个物质身体。心智在其周围构建了在你物质层面生存所必需的物质伪装。心智从内在感官接收资料，并形成必要的伪装。心智无意识或不自觉地根据对你的物质层面生存至关重要的伪装效果处理基本法则。心智是必须使用的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is important that you tie in this evolutionary material with previous data concerning the inner senses. The inner senses were always paramount in evolutionary development, being the impetus behind the physical formations; and themselves, through the use of mental enzymes, imprinting the data contained in the mental genes onto the physical camouflage material.
quotes.translation: 重要的是，你要将这些进化资料与之前关于内在感官的资料联系起来。内在感官在进化发展中始终至关重要，是物质形态背后的驱动力；它们本身通过使用心智酶，将心智基因中包含的资料印记到物质伪装材料上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have also explained how energy is transformed, and changes, adapting itself to the particular camouflage pattern of any given plane. Now in these tests you will reach the inner self. The results will be, then, valid in physical terms. The emotions are the outer extensions of the inner senses, and it is therefore through the intuitions and traveling, the traveling of the pathways of the emotions, that you will come in contact with the inner self, and therefore be able to carry back this information in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 我也解释过能量如何转化、改变，并适应任何特定层面的特定伪装模式。现在，在这些测试中，你将触及内在自体。其结果在物质层面也将是有效的。情感是内在感官的外在延伸，因此，通过直觉和旅行——情感路径的旅行——你将与内在自体接触，从而能够以同样的方式带回这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You cannot now do this physically, but you can do this through the use of the inner senses, trance states, hypnosis experiences, and intelligent use of the intuitions and imaginative powers. The universe is transparent to the inner senses. It is transparent functionally. It exists electromagnetically. All realities within it exist in their own band of intensity.
quotes.translation: 你现在无法在物质层面做到这一点，但你可以通过使用内在感官、出神状态、催眠体验，以及明智地运用直觉和想象力来做到。宇宙对内在感官而言是透明的。它在功能上是透明的。它以电磁方式存在。其中的所有实相都存在于它们自己的强度波段中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You perceive portions of such actions consciously, some subconsciously, some with the inner senses, but you do not perceive the whole action. Your perceptions, your physical perceptions, cut a good bit of the portion that you could receive into bits and pieces. Since you do not perceive whole action that occurs within your own system, you do not understand it. So it should not surprise you that you misinterpret projections of other actions from different systems, when they appear as they sometimes do within your own.
quotes.translation: 你有意识地感知到这类行动的部分，有些是潜意识地，有些是通过内在感官，但你并未感知到整个行动。你的感知，你的物质感知，将你本可能接收到的相当一部分切割成碎片。由于你并未感知到发生在你自己系统内的整个行动，你便无法理解它。因此，当你自己系统中有时出现来自不同系统的其他行动的投射时，你误解了它们，这也不足为奇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The material at the beginning of tonight's session is important. I suggest when you can that you reread the material on the inner senses, the fifth dimension and your precious flying saucers. There is a connection here with the transference of energy from any one plane to another, and from the inner senses for example to a painting, that should be very helpful.
quotes.translation: 今晚课程开始时的资料很重要。我建议你尽可能重读关于内在感官、第五维度和你们宝贵的飞碟的资料。这里存在着能量从任何一个层面转移到另一个层面的关联，例如从内在感官转移到一幅画作，这应该会非常有帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Here we have a combination of forces psychic showing themselves in chemical and electrical manifestations. The seasons as you know represent the physical construction of the inner psychic climate. As particular portions of matter are transformed, as the inner self, through the inner senses creates a simple material object that is picked up by the outer senses clearly as, say, a table, so are these other constructions that closely mirror inner reality that are perceived by the outer senses as effects.
quotes.translation: 这里我们有一种心灵力量的组合，以化学和电学现象展现自身。如你所知，季节代表了内在心灵气候的物质构建。正如特定部分的物质被转化，正如内在自体通过内在感官创造出一个简单的物质对象，被外在感官清晰地识别为，比如说，一张桌子，同样地，这些其他构建也紧密地映照内在实相，并被外在感官感知为效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: For simplicity's sake, let us say that there is a process of change. Those alive in your terms rely at least outwardly on the spoken word. Those who have left and survive, use thought words but do not need to speak, though they may (underlined). As proficiency grows and as the inner senses are more fully used, the necessity for even thought words vanishes.
quotes.translation: 为简单起见，我们假设存在一个变化的过程。在你们说法中活着的人，至少在外在依赖口头语言。那些已经离开并存活的人，使用思想语言但无需说话，尽管他们可能（下划线强调）。随着熟练度的增长以及内在感官被更充分地使用，甚至连思想语言的需求也会消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Up until then, the main communications had followed the characteristic patterns of units of consciousness (long pause), each unit knowing its relationship to all others upon the planet. Creatures relied upon inner senses while learning to operate the new, highly specific physical ones that pinpointed perception in time and place. This pinpointing of perception was of vital importance, for with the full arousal of consciousness in flesh, intersections with space and time [had to be] impeccable.
quotes.translation: 在此之前，主要的沟通遵循意识单元的特征模式（长停顿），每个单元都知道自己与地球上所有其他单元的关系。生物在学会运用高度特化的新物理感官时，仍依赖内在感官——这些物理感官能精准定位时空中的感知。这种感知的精准定位至关重要，因为当意识在肉身中完全觉醒时，与时空的交汇必须完美无瑕。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses to some extent will allow you to perceive the reality of inner existence, and Ruburt incidentally in this new development is involved with the use of these inner senses in a more effective manner than before. There are some changes in the way connections are made. This gives Ruburt a feeling of strangeness as he makes inner adjustments.
quotes.translation: 内在感官在某种程度上会让你感知到内在实相的存在。顺便一提，鲁柏在此新进展中，正以比以往更有效的方式运用这些内在感官。连接方式发生了一些变化，这使鲁柏在进行内在调整时感到陌生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The fields intermingle. I wanted to make another point, which was that data received by the inner senses is as intense and vivid, and often more so, than any psychological experience, and as I mentioned, you cannot examine a psychological experience in a laboratory either. But the worst of fools would not deny psychological experience for this reason.
quotes.translation: 场域相互交融。我想再补充一点：内在感官接收的数据与任何心理体验同样强烈生动，甚至往往更甚。如我所言，你同样无法在实验室中检验心理体验。但最愚钝之人也不会因此否认心理体验的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You would be more than disoriented, for example, but quite terrified, if between one moment and the next your familiar environment as you knew it disappeared to be replaced by other sets of data that you were not ready to understand, so much information from the inner senses must be translated in terms that you can comprehend. Such information must somehow make sense to you as three-dimensional selves, in other words.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，若在转瞬之间，你熟悉的周遭环境消失不见，被你还无法理解的另一组数据取代，你不仅会迷失方向，更会惊恐万分。因此，来自内在感官的大量信息必须转化为你能理解的术语。换言之，这些信息必须以三维自我能理解的方式呈现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I hope that you will develop along these lines, but the rate of progress is of course up to you, and your individual abilities will vary as to particulars. This is to be expected. As a rule the use of psychological time will help you both develop in a fairly balanced manner. I have enjoyed this evening's session. After some more material with our inner senses perhaps we shall take some time out to go into your various life readings, as I have let them go to get other material to you.
quotes.translation: 希望你们能沿着这些方向发展，但进步速度当然取决于你们自己，个体能力也会因具体情况而异。这是意料之中的事。通常来说，运用心理时间有助于你们以相对平衡的方式发展。我很享受今晚的课程。等我们探讨完更多关于内在感官的材料后，或许可以抽空解读你们的各种生命解读——我暂时搁置这些是为了给你们传递其他资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This talent for using energy to form unit patterns is elemental, not only on your plane but in all other planes. It involves drawing upon the basic vitality of the universe in using the inner senses, and actually pulling to oneself more and more of this under laying vitality. Lest this suggest images of grasp potbellied souls, gluttonously grabbing the stuff of the universe for themselves out of the mouths of the less ambitious, let me hasten to inform you that such is not the case.
quotes.translation: 这种运用能量形成单元模式的能力是根本性的，不仅存在于你们层面，也存在于所有其他层面。它涉及运用内在感官时汲取宇宙的基本生命力，并实际将更多这种底层生命力吸引到自身。为避免这让人联想到大腹便便的灵魂，贪婪地从较不进取者口中抢夺宇宙物质，容我赶紧说明：事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is a sort of psychic focus, a concentration of awareness along certain lines. As your ability grows in relation with the environment of your plane then you can afford to look around, use the inner senses, and enlarge your scope of activity. This is only natural. Survival on a particular plane depends upon your concentration in that plane. Again, when survival is more or less satisfied by attention then you can avail yourself of the opportunity to turn your attention elsewhere.
quotes.translation: 这是一种心灵上的聚焦，是意识沿着特定路径的集中。随着你在自身层面环境中能力的增长，你便得以环顾四周，运用内在感官，拓展你的活动范围。这完全是自然而然的。在特定层面的生存取决于你对该层面的专注。同样，当生存需求通过关注得到基本满足后，你便可以利用机会将注意力转向别处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are always receiving data from the inner senses. It is sifted through the subconscious, and when you receive it directly, or more or less directly for the first time, it can be frightening merely because of the unfamiliarity, and because of the unusual vividness. This is why I have said that the inner senses present their own evidence.
quotes.translation: 你始终在接收来自内在感官的数据。这些数据经由潜意识筛选，当你第一次直接或近乎直接地接收它们时，可能会因陌生感以及异常的鲜明度而感到恐惧。正因如此，我曾说过内在感官会呈现它们自己的证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I had intended this evening to go into our third inner sense and instead ended up with other materials. We still have very much on the inner senses to cover. Not only will they be named but you will be given exercises in their separate use. Again, this is difficult, because for me they operate in a more coordinated and organized pattern.
quotes.translation: 我原本打算今晚探讨我们的第三种内在感官，结果却转向了其他材料。关于内在感官，我们仍有大量内容需要覆盖。不仅会为它们命名，还会提供单独运用它们的练习。再次强调，这很困难，因为对我来说，它们是以更协调、更有组织的方式运作的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Using air again as a simple analogy to our fuel for the inner senses, which is converted by the various countries or planes for their own purposes and therefore camouflaged, air in its pure state is not observed easily.
