And permeating everything, it could almost pass unnoticed itself since it takes on the form of that which it composes.
quotes.translation: 再次以空气作为简单类比，来比喻我们内在感官的燃料——这种燃料被不同国度或层面根据自身目的转化并加以伪装——纯净状态的空气并不容易被观察到。而它渗透万物，几乎可能因其自身构成之物而未被察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is not that physical reality is false. It is that the physical picture is simply one of an infinite number of ways of perceiving the various guises through which consciousness expresses itself. The physical senses force you to translate experience into physical perceptions. The inner senses open your range of perception, allow you to interpret experience in a far freer manner and to create new forms and new channels through which you, or any consciousness, can know itself.
quotes.translation: 并非物质实相是虚假的。而是物质画面仅仅是意识表达自身时所呈现的无数种感知伪装方式之一。物质感官迫使你将经验转化为物质感知。内在感官则拓展你的感知范围，让你能以更自由的方式诠释经验，并创造新的形式与新的渠道，通过它们，你或任何意识都能认识自身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ego failure may result. Development of the inner senses is a much more effective method of perceiving other realities, and followed correctly, the ego is not only stronger but more flexible, and consciousness even of physical reality is increased. Such development becomes an unfolding and a natural expansion of the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 自我可能会因此失败。发展内在感官是感知其他实相更有效的方法，若正确遵循，自我不仅会更强大，而且更灵活，甚至对物质实相的觉知也会增强。这种发展将成为整个人格的自然展开与扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: What you have in the spider's activity amounts to a demonstration of the sixth inner sense almost in its pure form. The spider has no intellect or outer ego, and his manipulations are the direct result of activities performed by pure and spontaneous use of the inner senses. They are unhampered and un-camouflaged to a great extent.
quotes.translation: 蜘蛛的活动几乎纯粹展现了第六内在感官的运作。蜘蛛没有智力或外在自我，其操作是纯粹自发运用内在感官的直接结果。在很大程度上，这些活动不受阻碍且未被伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: * Inner vibrational touch is one of our Inner Senses. Seth lists these in Chapter Nineteen of The Seth Material. To paraphrase: Using this sense, an observer standing on a typical street would feel the experience of being anything he chose within his field of notice: people, trees, insects, blades of grass. He would retain his own consciousness, and would perceive sensations somewhat in the way we now feel heat and cold. This sense is like empathy, but much more vital.
quotes.translation: * 内在振动触觉是内在感官之一。赛斯在《赛斯资料》第十九章中列举了这些感官。转述如下：运用此感官时，站在典型街道上的观察者会感受到自己注意范围内任何事物的体验：人、树木、昆虫、草叶。他会保留自身意识，并以类似我们感知冷热的方式感知各种感觉。此感官类似同理心，但更为生动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses are connected then to the physical mechanism. Sometimes inner perceptions may be touched off as a result of stimuli received through the outer senses. In many cases however the stimulus comes from the deeper levels of the self, where however it may be translated into terms that the personal subconscious can use.
quotes.translation: 内在感官与身体机制相连。有时内在感知可能因外在感官接收的刺激而被触发。然而在许多情况下，刺激来自自我更深层面，在此处可能被转化为个人潜意识可用的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a whole you do not as yet understand the inner senses intellectually. The part of yourself which you deny understands the inner senses well. But this does you no good at this stage of the game and so you are in the peculiar position, once more, of trying to dissect the inner world with camouflage tools.
quotes.translation: 确实，整体而言你们尚未从智力上理解内在感官。你们所否认的那部分自我却深谙内在感官。但在当前阶段这对你们毫无助益，因此你们再次陷入用伪装工具剖析内在世界的奇特处境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now: On certain occasions, sometimes near the point of death, but often simply in conscious states outside of the body, man is able to perceive that kind of light. In some out-of-body experiences Ruburt, for example, saw colors more dazzling than any physical ones, and you saw the same kind of colors in your dream. They are a part of your inner senses' larger spectrum of perception, and in the dream state you were not relying upon your physical senses at all.
quotes.translation: 现在：在某些时刻——有时濒临死亡，但更多时候仅处于体外意识状态——人类能够感知那种光。例如在出体体验中，鲁柏曾见过比任何物理色彩更耀眼的颜色，而你在梦境中也见过同类色彩。它们属于内在感官更广阔的感知光谱，在梦境中你完全未依赖肉体感官。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They must be interpreted instead through the use of those inner senses of which I have spoken, for these are the basic tools of the inner self. I realize that it is frowned upon to speak in terms of a limited intellect, which cannot understand a whole reality because of a built-in deficiency; nevertheless while it is true that the intellect by itself cannot grasp or comprehend inner reality, this should not be thought of as a deficiency inherent in intellect.
quotes.translation: 它们必须通过我所说的那些内在感官来诠释，因为这些是内在自我的基本工具。我明白用有限智力的概念来讨论会招致非议——仿佛因先天缺陷而无法理解整体实相；然而尽管智力本身确实无法把握或理解内在实相，但这不应被视为智力固有的缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am rather surprised that Ruburt hit upon this one at this time, as it is usually a rather difficult ability to attain.... Ruburt experienced this on a physical level, trying to translate inner data into sensation that could be recognized by the outer senses. This seventh inner sense represents an extension of the self, a widening of its conscious comprehension ... or a pulling together into ... a minute capsule that enables the self to enter other fields.
quotes.translation: 我很惊讶鲁柏这次能触及这一点，因为这通常是一项相当难掌握的能力……鲁柏在物质层面体验了它，试图将内在数据转化为能被外在感官识别的感觉。这第七种内在感官代表自我的延伸、意识理解的拓宽……或是将自我凝聚成……一个微小的胶囊，使其能够进入其他领域。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 681)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Your idea of keeping detailed records of psychological time experiments is an excellent one. There is at least a possibility that you and Ruburt, using your own individual inner senses, may at times perceive different aspects of a given situation, and that the individual perceptions will enable you to achieve a greater knowledge of a specific, or any specific, happening than either of you separately could achieve. This of course will take time and training.
quotes.translation: 你详细记录心理时间实验的想法非常出色。你和鲁柏至少有可能利用各自的内在感官，有时会感知到同一情境的不同面向，而这些个体感知将使你们比单独一人时更能深入了解某个特定事件——或任何特定事件。这当然需要时间和训练。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, the strange sensation experienced by Ruburt just before this session was a taste of our seventh inner sense, but only a small portion. It represents enlargement or an opening up and extension. This operates in two directions. The purpose of the enlargement or extension I will discuss at the next session. It is of course an enlargement or extension of the self, and a widening of the boundaries of the self, and therefore of even conscious comprehension.
quotes.translation: 现在，鲁柏在本次课之前体验到的奇异感觉，正是我们第七种内在感官的滋味，但只是极小的一部分。它代表扩张、开启与延伸。这以两种方式运作。关于扩张或延伸的目的，我将在下次课讨论。这当然是自我的扩张与延伸，是自我边界的拓宽，因此也是意识理解的拓宽。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Information like this is sifted through many layers of subconscious conception, and is subsequently colored. People believing in your organized religions color it in a manner that is highly disadvantageous, and that unfortunately adds to existing superstitions. Ruburt's mind, believe it or not, is much like my own -- though, if you'll forgive me, in a very limited fashion. Therefore the distortions are much less distortive, much less harmful, and more easily discovered and cleared ... Others less perfectionist than myself are content with more distortion. I am not. Ruburt's Idea Construction9 was rather amazing. The inner senses provided him with much, but nevertheless the ideas contained in it represented an achievement of the conscious mind. I was drawn by this to realize that he was ready for me.
quotes.translation: 这类信息会经过许多层潜意识概念的筛选，随后被着色。信奉你们那些组织化宗教的人会以一种极为不利的方式为其着色，不幸的是这反而助长了现有的迷信。信不信由你，鲁柏的心智与我的非常相似——尽管，请恕我直言，是以一种非常有限的方式。因此扭曲的程度小得多，危害也小得多，更容易被发现和清除……其他不如我这般完美主义的人，对更多的扭曲也感到满意。但我不。鲁柏的《观念构建9》相当惊人。内在感官为他提供了许多，但其中包含的观念仍是意识心智的成就。我被此吸引，意识到他已准备好迎接我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: All of our material should be of great practical value. Remember that the subconscious is at the outer end of the inner senses, and the inner senses create physical constructions. Once you learn how to handle and communicate with your subconscious, then you will be able to create more constructive constructions--
quotes.translation: 我们所有的资料都应具有极大的实用价值。记住，潜意识位于内在感官的外端，而内在感官创造物质建构。一旦你学会如何驾驭并与你的潜意识沟通，你就能创造更具建设性的建构——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am very glad that this is not test night. Shall I give you all gold stars? Nevertheless, at least you do remember to some degree. It is not remembering with which we are concerned, however. The inner senses, and this should help Philip, the inner senses deal with direct perception of reality, of inner reality.
quotes.translation: 我很高兴今晚不是测试之夜。要我给你们都发金星吗？不过，至少你们确实记得一些。但我们关心的并非记忆。内在感官——这应该能帮到菲利普——内在感官处理的是对实相的直接感知，对内在实相的直接感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Outer physical time is a complete camouflage, unnecessary basically on your plane; but you have made it seem necessary because of your refusal to admit the inner self as part of your whole personality, and therefore you have not been able to utilize psychological time to its fullest advantage on your plane. Psychological time as I have said is a natural pathway, part of an inner sense, that was meant as an easy access from the inner to the outer world and back again. You do not use it as such.
quotes.translation: 外在物理时间是彻底的伪装，基本上在你的层面上并非必要；但由于你拒绝承认内在自己是完整人格的一部分，因此你无法在你的层面上充分发挥心理时间的优势。如我所言，心理时间是一条天然的通道，是内在感官的一部分，本应作为从内在世界通往外在世界再返回的便捷途径。你们并未如此运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego or the inner self-conscious self directs such experiences and uses the inner senses in much the same way that you use the outer senses, except that the inner ego knows all of the mechanics involved in the use of the inner senses, and you know little of the mechanics involved with the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 内在自我或内在意识自我引导这类体验，并运用内在感官，其方式与你运用外在感官大致相同，区别在于内在自我知晓运用内在感官的所有机制，而你对涉及外在感官的机制却知之甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When you receive more material on the inner senses, you can begin using them to a much higher degree than you do now. For those interested in inner reality the inner senses can be utilized, of course, to explore and perceive portions of this inner reality; and the inner reality is after all what you are after.
quotes.translation: 当你获得更多关于内在感官的资料时，你便能开始比现在更高程度地运用它们。对于对内在实相感兴趣的人来说，当然可以利用内在感官来探索和感知内在实相的各个部分；而内在实相终究是你所追求的目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Obviously, to some degree he has been able to use his inner senses. However many of the fragmentary apparitions that he has seen, for he has actually seen more fragmentary apparitions than he realizes, many of these have been fragmentary through his own inability to organize the material from the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 显然，他在某种程度上已能运用内在感官。然而，他所见的许多片段性幻象——实际上他见过的片段性幻象比他意识到的更多——这些幻象之所以支离破碎，正是因为他自身无法组织来自内在感官的资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt was right. We shall call the eighth inner sense the sense of disentanglement; and it is one of the most basic inner senses. Complete disentanglement comes rarely on your plane, although it is possible to achieve it with training. Variations occur but usually some remnant of camouflage data is retained.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏是对的。我们将第八种内在感官称为"解离感官"；它是最基本的内在感官之一。在你的层面上，完全的解离极为罕见，尽管通过训练有可能达成。变化时有发生，但通常仍会保留某些伪装数据的残余。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are a few points that I would like to make of a general nature. Ruburt has been reading Jung, though not consistently. The libido does not originate in the individual subconscious of the present personality. It originates instead in the energy of the entity and inner self, and is directed by means of the inner senses, outward so to speak, through the deeper layers of the individual subconscious mind, then through the outer or personal layers.
quotes.translation: 我想提出几点普遍性的看法。鲁柏一直在阅读荣格的作品，尽管并非持续不断。力比多并非源自当前人格的个体潜意识。相反，它源自存有与内在自我的能量，并通过内在感官向外引导——可以说——穿过个体潜意识的深层，再经由外在或个人层。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The actual communication is not in words or pictures. Material from the inner senses is very seldom experienced by the conscious mind in its pure condition. What you get is a hasty twisting of channel, a rather inept and usually somewhat disastrous attempt to pick up this material with the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 实际的沟通并非通过文字或图像。内在感官的纯粹资料很少被意识心体验到。你所得到的只是对频道仓促的扭曲，一种相当笨拙且通常有些灾难性的尝试，试图用外在感官来接收这些资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I was going to say that discipline is even more important in the use of the inner senses than you might think. It is true that focusing upon the inner reality at times requires a temporary lessening of outer focus, and this would sometimes give the appearance of letting go, but the inner concentration requires discipline and intent. It is quite possible to let the inner and the outer senses operate at the same time. It merely takes practice.
quotes.translation: 我本来要说，在使用内在感官时，纪律比你可能想象的更为重要。确实，聚焦于内在实相有时需要暂时减弱对外在的专注，这有时会显得像是放手，但内在的专注需要纪律和意图。让内在与外在感官同时运作是完全可能的，这只需要练习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Though this thought-image usually is not seen by others, it is quite possible that in the future scientific instruments may perceive it. As it is, such an image may be perceived by those who have developed use of the inner senses. Any intense mental act -- thought or emotion -- will not only be constructed in some physical or pseudophysical manner, but will also bear to some extent the imprint of the personality who originally conceived it.
quotes.translation: 虽然这个思想影像通常不被他人看见，但未来科学仪器很可能会感知到它。就目前而言，这种影像可能被那些发展了内在感官运用的人所感知。任何强烈的心理活动——思想或情感——不仅会以某种物质或类物质的方式被构建，还会在一定程度上带有最初构想它的人格的印记。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This difference in immediacy is rather important for our consideration of the inner senses. This is also why I mentioned that the ears and the eyes, while connected with the body, are directed outward. They bring data to the body but very seldom do they collect data from the body. I am beginning to get into some material that is relatively difficult to explain, considering that I must take all of your camouflage patterns into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这种即时性的差异对我们考虑内在感官相当重要。这也是为什么我提到耳朵和眼睛虽然与身体相连，却朝向外在。它们将资料带给身体，但很少从身体收集资料。考虑到我必须顾及你们所有的伪装模式，我开始进入一些相对难以解释的资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: On the other hand your inner senses are much more reliable. Your inner data is much more reliable. Your psychological experience is valid, whether chairs are solid or not. And the inner data and the inner self which you deny is a lot more permanent, my dear Joseph, and I am speaking to you as proof.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，你的内在感官要可靠得多。你的内在资料要可靠得多。无论椅子是否坚固，你的心理经验都是有效的。而你否认的内在资料和内在自我，我亲爱的约瑟夫，要持久得多，我正以你本人作为证明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your animals possess a closer bond by means of the inner senses. Remember our analogy of the spider and its web. The web exists both in time and space, as all physical constructions do. That is why I have said that your universe does not exist in the same fashion as the web, simply because it is not bound by space or time. The universe expands, again, in terms of value fulfillment, and in ways which your outer senses cannot comprehend.
quotes.translation: 你们的动物通过内在感官拥有更紧密的联系。记住我们关于蜘蛛及其网的比喻。网存在于时间和空间中，如同所有物质建构一样。这就是为什么我说你们的宇宙并不以与网相同的方式存在，仅仅因为它不受空间或时间的束缚。宇宙再次以价值完成的方式扩展，以你们外在感官无法理解的方式扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, both of you have particularly strongly-developed latent abilities as far as the inner senses are concerned. Otherwise these sessions would not be possible. It is true that at the present time your abilities vary in direction, yet they complement each other in action and therefore in result.
quotes.translation: 就内在感官而言，你们两位都拥有特别强烈发展的潜在能力。否则这些课程便不可能进行。诚然，目前你们的能力方向各有不同，但在行动中却能互补，因此结果也相辅相成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Through the inner senses, therefore, some enlightenment can be received as to both the actual existence of dimensions that the physical self cannot perceive; and also through the inner senses, a sense of confidence and continuity can be achieved through the inner self's knowledge of its freedom.
quotes.translation: 因此，通过内在感官，可以领悟到物质自我无法感知的维度确实存在；同时，通过内在感官，内在自我对其自由的认知也能带来信心与连续感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: An experience in general is composed of electromagnetic pulsations. (Long pause) They contain a kind of depth, having nothing to do with space, an existence dependent upon, again, intensity rather than duration. However, because of your own basic assumptions such experiences, perceived by the inner senses, are played back in such a manner that a traveling through intensities results in a journey through time within your own dimension.
quotes.translation: 一般而言，经验由电磁脉冲构成。（长停顿）它们包含一种与空间无关的深度，其存在再次取决于强度而非持续时间。然而，由于你们自身的基本假设，内在感官所感知的这些经验会以这样的方式回放：穿越强度的过程，在你们自己的维度中便成为一场穿越时间的旅程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying, or should, that the inner self sends its projections of inner senses through both the physical universe and the dream universe; yet all this talk of space and placement is a mere convenience. Yet, in terms of physical construction this is what you would find, and this, if it were understood, is what is seen in the actual construction of the most minute physical particle under observation in your laboratories.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻（或理应如此），内在自我将其内在感官的投射发送至物质宇宙与梦境宇宙；然而，所有这些关于空间与位置的讨论仅为方便起见。但就物质构造而言，这正是你们会发现的情况；若被理解，这便是在实验室中观察最微小物质粒子实际构造时所见的景象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （This was true. Recalling this statement as I had first recorded it, I had wondered about its accuracy more and more as Seth gave us additional information on the much wider abilities of the inner senses. Later, checking my original handwritten notes, I found that I had indeed taken the statement down that way then typed it up that way. So, although we didn't pinpoint the exact cause of the error, at least it has been corrected.）
quotes.translation: （这确实属实。回想我最初记录这句话时，随着赛斯向我们提供关于内在感官更广泛能力的更多信息，我越来越怀疑其准确性。后来，核对我的原始手写笔记，我发现我确实那样记录下了这句话，然后那样打字出来。因此，虽然我们未能精确指出错误的根源，但至少已予以纠正。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that evidence cannot be found, and overwhelming evidence, for the existence of the inner senses. It does mean that spontaneity must be allowed for. It is extremely difficult to relate data received by the inner senses into data that will be picked up by the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着无法找到证据——而且是有力的证据——来证明内在感官的存在。这确实意味着必须允许自发性存在。将内在感官接收的数据转化为能被外在感官捕捉的数据，是极其困难的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I do not want to go into other inner sense material this evening as it is too late to begin on the fourth inner sense. Try and use psychological time as I have told you. This is extremely valuable, for it is the channel through which all other inner data must come at your particular stage.
quotes.translation: 今晚我不想深入探讨其他内在感官的资料，因为现在开始讲解第四内在感官已经太晚了。请尽量按照我告诉你的方式运用心理时间。这极为重要，因为在你们目前的阶段，所有其他内在资料都必须通过这个管道才能获得。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Whatever your language, you perceive trees, mountains, people, oceans. You never see a man merge with a tree, for example. This would be considered an hallucinatory image. Your visual data are learned and interpreted so that they appear as the only possible results of those data. Inner vision can confound you, because in your mind you often see images quite clearly that you would dismiss if your eyes were open. In the terms of which we are speaking, however, the young species utilized what I have called the "inner senses" to a far greater degree than you do. Visually, early man did not perceive the physical world in the way that seems natural to you.
quotes.translation: 无论你使用何种语言，你所感知的都是树木、山峦、人类、海洋。例如，你永远不会看到一个人与一棵树融合，这会被视为幻觉影像。你的视觉数据经过学习和解读，以至于它们看起来是这些数据唯一可能的结果。内在视觉可能会让你困惑，因为在你脑海中，你常常清晰地看到一些图像，但如果你睁开眼睛，就会忽略它们。然而，就我们讨论的范畴而言，早期人类利用我所谓的"内在感官"的程度远高于你们。在视觉上，早期人类感知物质世界的方式与你们认为理所当然的方式截然不同。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We will go into these laws, and outline others in future sessions. You will see also how the inner senses are equipped to perceive basic inner realities of the inner universe, in much the same manner that your outer senses are equipped to manipulate within your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 我们将在未来的课程中深入探讨这些法则，并概述其他法则。你们也会看到，内在感官如何被设计用来感知内在宇宙的基本内在实相，其方式与你们的外在感官被设计用来在你们的伪装宇宙中运作的方式大致相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You will have to strike a balance. Too many influences of this nature would be distracting, but some are definitely necessary; and again now, I would suggest that you invite a few congenial visitors to your home. Telepathically and through the inner senses, you pick up extremely valuable and diversified data in this manner, that is enlightening and helpful to the subconscious, and broadens the psychic base of awareness.
quotes.translation: 你们必须取得平衡。太多这种性质的影响会分散注意力，但有些绝对是必要的；现在我再次建议，你们邀请一些志趣相投的访客到家中。通过心灵感应和内在感官，你们能以这种方式获取极为宝贵且多样化的资料，这些资料对潜意识具有启发和帮助作用，并能拓宽意识的灵性基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Full use of the inner senses is not even for me yet. There is still a long way for me to go. We progress along these lines according to our capabilities and our own strengths. The conscious ego also develops in a strange manner through all this, as I will now attempt to explain.
quotes.translation: 即使对我而言，也尚未能完全运用内在感官。我还有很长的路要走。我们根据自身的能力和优势沿着这些路线前进。有意识的自我也会通过这一切以奇特的方式发展，我现在将尝试解释这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In dreams, when you expect none, none appear. Out of body experiences indeed can be a health boon. Your system is automatically relaxed and free of pressure. Also, incidentally, free of time. It does not age during a projection; that is, the body does not age. It is in suspension. Any interpretations that are made are made by consciousness itself. The physical senses are not， underline not, utilized. At the moment of perception the traveling consciousness perceives through the inner senses, and by itself automatically makes the necessary adjustments so that the ego can perceive the data in its accustomed way.
quotes.translation: 在梦中，当你没有期待时，它们就不会出现。出体体验确实可以有益健康。你的系统会自动放松，没有压力。而且，顺便一提，也没有时间。在投射期间，身体不会老化；也就是说，身体不会衰老。它处于悬浮状态。任何诠释都是由意识本身进行的。物质感官并未被利用，请注意，是未被利用。在感知的瞬间，旅行的意识通过内在感官进行感知，并自动做出必要的调整，以便自我能够以它习惯的方式感知资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You may have experiences through all of the inner senses but not at once. This is a great simplification. What I should perhaps add for the sake of clearness is that you will not as a rule be aware of data that comes to you through more than one sense, inner sense, at a time.
quotes.translation: 你可能会通过所有内在感官获得体验，但并非同时发生。这是一个极大的简化。为求清晰起见，我或许应该补充说明：通常情况下，你不会意识到同时通过一种以上感官（内在感官）传来的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The physical brain as you know it is but the camouflage mechanism belonging to the physically oriented self. In some cases, severe damage is done to the brain, and yet rationality continues. In these cases the mind behind the brain operates as always. When the individual is convinced that his activities are completely dependent upon the physical brain, then he is incapacitated almost completely by any injury to it. The brain itself contains knowledge that comes through the inner senses, and this knowledge would simply not be available to it, if it were dependent upon physical data completely.
quotes.translation: 你所知的物质大脑，不过是属于物质导向自我的伪装机制。在某些案例中，大脑遭受严重损伤，但理性依然持续运作。在这些情况下，大脑背后的心智一如既往地运作。当个体坚信自己的活动完全依赖物质大脑时，任何对大脑的损伤几乎都会使他完全丧失能力。大脑本身包含通过内在感官获得的知识，如果它完全依赖物质数据，这些知识根本不可能为大脑所获得。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: These sessions represent quite an accomplishment on both of your parts, and you do use your inner senses to some important degree. Otherwise the material would not come through with any dependability. We have here what amounts to a gestalt of a kind. It is natural that your energies rise and ebb, and this is to be expected. To some degree I am able to reinforce your energies, and I do as you may have suspected.
quotes.translation: 这些课代表你们双方相当了不起的成就，你们确实在相当重要的程度上运用了内在感官。否则这些资料不可能以任何可靠性传递过来。我们在此拥有某种完形。你们的能量有起有落是自然现象，这也在意料之中。在某种程度上，我能够增强你们的能量，而且正如你们可能已经猜到的，我确实这么做了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You do not even perceive camouflage reality with your outer senses with any dependability. Telepathy, which belongs to the inner senses, is used constantly. Without it your languages would be meaningless. The inner senses, Philip, experience direct data instantaneously.
quotes.translation: 你们甚至无法可靠地通过外在感官感知伪装实相。属于内在感官的心电感应被持续使用着。没有它，你们的语言将毫无意义。菲利普，内在感官能瞬间体验直接数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is true that Joseph receives much data through inner visions. In the past he has more or less translated this data automatically into a new camouflage pattern, in other words into a painting, without realizing that he had received any vision at all. You can learn, Joseph, to use your other inner senses as I tell you more about them.
quotes.translation: 确实，约瑟通过内在视像接收到许多数据。过去他或多或少自动将这些数据转化为新的伪装模式，换句话说就是转化为画作，却完全没意识到自己接收过任何视像。约瑟，你可以学习运用其他内在感官，正如我告诉你更多关于它们的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And as far as motion is concerned, the tree moves upward and downward. It is quite unfair to say that it cannot transport itself since it does so to an amazing degree, the roots and limbs moving in all directions. The inner senses of all plant life are well attuned, alert and very important. All these fragments have consciousness to a rather high degree, considering that man holds them in such ill repute.
quotes.translation: 至于运动，树木向上和向下移动。说它无法自行移动是相当不公平的，因为它确实以惊人的程度在移动，根部和枝干向各个方向伸展。所有植物生命的内在感官都调谐良好、警觉敏锐且极其重要。考虑到人类对它们如此轻视，这些片段意识实际上具有相当高的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The material will probably reflect such fluctuations, but as a whole it will gain and not suffer. There is a balance to be maintained here. I do not want to drive you too hard. On the other hand I have no intention of letting you grow lazy. We will still probably run over our usual time on some occasions, while during certain periods we may run somewhat less. This is of no consequence. I may have more to say on your expanding universe next time, and there is still material on our next inner senses to be covered. I usually end up getting sidetracked in one way or another.
quotes.translation: 资料内容或许会反映这些波动，但整体而言只会增益而非受损。这里需要维持平衡。我不想过度驱使你，但另一方面也无意让你变得懈怠。某些时候我们仍可能超时，而某些时期则会缩短时间，这都无关紧要。下次关于你不断扩展的宇宙，我或许还有更多要说的，此外还有关于下一个内在感官的资料需要涵盖。我总是不知不觉就偏离了主题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This involves efficient, complete use of the outer senses in their perception of camouflage reality, and of joyful, effective behavior and manipulation within that field of camouflage in which you spend a certain level of your existence. When you operate within it you should indeed experience it completely, in as many phases as possible, and be it to a much greater degree than is usually achieved, the conscious mind using itself then in experience, and thus knowing itself. And then the switch to use of the inner senses. The great contrast then refreshes the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这涉及对外在感官的充分运用，使其在感知伪装实相时达到高效完整，并在你存在某个层次所经历的伪装场域中展现愉悦、有效的行动与操控。当你置身其中时，确实应当尽可能全面地体验它，比通常达到的程度更深入——让意识心在体验中运用自身，从而认知自身。随后再切换至内在感官的运用。这种强烈的对比将使整个自我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned, the sixth inner sense involves something that can be likened to what you call the instincts, except that it is a property of the inner self. Consider a spider spinning a web. The web is a camouflage pattern that definitely exists on your plane. Here your simple spider is using his sixth sense, for these senses are the latent property of other living things, and not restricted to mankind.
quotes.translation: 如我所提，第六内在感官涉及某种类似你们所谓本能的东西，但它是内在自体的属性。试想蜘蛛织网的过程。蛛网是确实存在于你们层面的伪装模式。此处这只简单的蜘蛛正在运用它的第六感，因为这些感官是其他生物潜藏的特性，并非人类独有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I wanted, then, to make another point about Ruburt's experience last night in connection with the inner senses. Ruburt was quite capable as far as ability was concerned, to know what time it was without the addition of the vision of the clock. This was secondary. It seems that on your plane there is almost always the temptation to translate inner data in terms that the ego can understand and interpret.
quotes.translation: 关于鲁柏昨晚与内在感官相关的经历，我还想补充一点。就能力而言，鲁柏完全能够不借助时钟幻象就知道时间。时钟幻象只是次要的。在你们层面似乎总存在一种诱惑，要将内在资料转化为自我能够理解与诠释的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: With the full use of the inner senses, however, it is theoretically possible to perceive all the shapes and forms that have ever been, or will ever be, adopted by the atoms and molecules that compose the particular chair. This kind of experience is beyond the power of drugs. It is true to say that in one sense both you and Ruburt are a part of the table and the chair, and the room in which they sit.
quotes.translation: 然而，当充分运用内在感官时，理论上可以感知构成特定椅子的原子与分子曾经采用或将要采用的所有形态与形式。这种体验远非药物所能企及。确切地说，从某种意义而言，你和鲁柏都是那张桌子、那把椅子以及它们所在房间的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The third personality of Christ will indeed be known as a great psychic, for it is he who will teach humanity to use those inner senses that alone make true spirituality possible. Slayers and victims will change roles as reincarnational memories rise to the surface of consciousness. Through the development of these abilities, the sacredness of all life will be intimately recognized and appreciated.
quotes.translation: 基督的第三人格确实将被视为伟大的通灵者，因为正是他将教导人类运用那些内在感官——唯有这些感官才能使真正的灵性成为可能。随着轮回记忆浮现至意识表层，杀戮者与受害者将互换角色。通过发展这些能力，一切生命的圣洁性将被深切认知与珍视。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is true that the difference is beyond words, that is the sense apparatus that you are trying to use, is much different than the outer apparatus with which you are familiar. The inner senses however give much stronger impressions than ones given by the outer senses. When we really progress in our sessions, you will have results that are as real as the outer camouflages that you take for granted.
quotes.translation: 确实，这种差异难以言喻——你们试图使用的感知机制，与你们熟悉的外在机制截然不同。然而内在感官所给予的印象远比外在感官强烈得多。当我们的课程真正取得进展时，你们将获得与你们视为理所当然的外在伪装同样真实的成果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Imagine looking at a scene outside your window as Ruburt now allows me to do. From Ruburt's viewpoint he receives the visual image with auditory effects. A slightly cold draft of air leaks in through the window. He does not smell anything from the outside. With use of the complete set of inner senses the experience would be to you astonishingly more rich, varied, direct, and instantly instructive.
quotes.translation: 想象一下鲁柏此刻允许我透过他的视角望向窗外。从鲁柏的视角，他接收到带有听觉效果的视觉影像。一丝微凉的空气从窗缝渗入，他并未闻到任何外界气味。若运用完整的内在感官系统，这体验对你们而言将惊人地更丰富、更多元、更直接，且即刻具有启发性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The tree does not even build up an image of man, which is why this is difficult to explain. I have no intention of going deeper into this matter than you can follow at this time. Nevertheless the tree builds up a composite sensation which represents say an individual man. And the same tree will recognize the same man who passes it by each day. Beside the recognized outer senses, and the inner senses of which you are just now beginning to gain knowledge, there are other inner and even outer senses, which you are not quite ready to understand.
quotes.translation: 树木甚至不会构建人类的影像——这正是此事难以解释的原因。我无意在此刻深入探讨超出你们理解范畴的内容。但树木会构建一种复合感知，用以表征某个特定人类。同一棵树能识别每日经过它的同一个人。除了已知的外在感官，以及你们刚刚开始认知的内在感官之外，还存在其他你们尚未准备好理解的内在与外在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As far as inner senses go, it is an extremely basic and rudimentary sense, containing within it the possibility of other inner senses. Although it is one of the most necessary senses, I could not give it to you first since you would not have understood it.
quotes.translation: 就内在感官而言，这是极为基础原始的感官，其本身蕴含着其他内在感官的可能性。虽然它是最必要的感官之一，但我不能首先将其授予你们，因为你们当时尚无法理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Perception of beauty through the senses is the trigger on your plane for subsequent inner perceptions. The two are so closely bound, through music for example, which can only be appreciated through the senses. Psychic actions take place which lead the individual beyond the senses. There is much more to be said here. There is a phrase which I will explain at a later date--inner senses--which you will find extremely interesting. By this I mean senses within the senses. I would use behind the senses but I believe this would lead to confusion.
quotes.translation: 通过感官感知美，是你们层面上触发后续内在感知的契机。两者紧密相连——例如音乐，唯有通过感官才能被欣赏。心灵活动由此展开，引领个体超越感官。此处尚有更多可探讨之处。有个短语我将在日后解释——"感官中的感官"——你们会发现它极为有趣。我本想用"感官背后的感官"，但恐造成混淆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If your mother or father found continued life together completely unbearable, which incidentally they do not, then in all likelihood one of their entities would suggest through the inner senses that the relationship be discontinued. If the advice was not heeded, and as the situation grew worse, a danger point would arise beyond which the personalities could not safely continue their association.
quotes.translation: 倘若你们的父母发现共同生活完全无法忍受（顺便一提，他们并非如此），那么他们的某个存有极可能通过内在感官建议终止这段关系。若此建议未被采纳，随着情况恶化，将出现危险临界点——超越此点后，双方人格便无法安全地继续关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Do not be impatient. As you continue with this exercise over a period of time you will be able to go further away, orienting yourself as you grow more familiar with the feeling of your mind. Gradually you will discover that this inner sense data will become clearer and clearer as you move toward another "station." It will represent reality as perceived from a different state of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 不要急躁。随着你持续进行这项练习一段时间后，你将能够走得更远，在逐渐熟悉心智感受的过程中找到自己的方向。当你朝另一个"站点"移动时，你会渐渐发现这些内在感官的数据会变得越来越清晰。它将呈现从不同意识状态所感知到的实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You will have no doubt noticed that these inner senses all represent actual inner abilities. I am rather surprised that Ruburt hit upon this one at this time, as it is usually a rather difficult ability to attain. He went along with it, which is very good, but he didn't sustain it long enough so that he could distinguish the other tissue capsules which came within his own extended awareness.
quotes.translation: 你无疑已经注意到，这些内在感官都代表着实际的内在能力。我相当惊讶鲁柏这次能触及这个能力，因为这通常是一个相当难以达到的能力。他配合得很好，这是非常好的，但他没有持续足够长的时间，以致无法分辨出那些进入他扩展意识范围内的其他组织囊。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What you are pleased to call the subconscious represents merely the part of the inner senses, or of the inner self, that even your society can no longer ignore. And this is indeed only the surface. Here you find of course the repository for personal memories, and not of personal ego-bound conscious memories either, but also of psychological experiences that the ego itself prefers to forget.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的潜意识，仅仅代表着内在感官或内在自体的那一部分，甚至连你们的社会都无法再忽视它。而这确实只是表面。在这里，你当然会发现个人记忆的储存库，而且不仅是受自我束缚的意识记忆，还包括自我本身宁愿遗忘的心理经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: However, when it is enabled to let go its preoccupation with the camouflage universe, it can receive and be aware of data received by the inner senses. Such data does not have to be retained on a subconscious level. The conscious personality can be trained to receive, interpret and retain such knowledge. Otherwise such knowledge would be relatively without value in your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 然而，当它能够放下对伪装宇宙的执念时，它就能接收并觉察到内在感官所接收的数据。这类数据不必保留在潜意识层面。有意识的人格可以被训练来接收、解读并保留这类知识。否则，这类知识在你们的伪装宇宙中相对而言将毫无价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is as if I was operating on one of many channels, and I am still in the process of teaching you to operate the other dials. When you grow in proficiency, and I certainly hope you will, then much greater dimension will be given to these sessions, with your help. You are getting now something that corresponds to one thin wispy signal, or one tinny distant sound, or one clouded foggy image. In the future as I said the dimension will grow. Your own inner senses will add greater reality than you can imagine at this point.
quotes.translation: 这就像我在众多频道中的其中一个频道上运作，而我仍在教导你们操作其他旋钮的过程中。当你们熟练度提升时——我当然希望你们能做到——那么这些课将在你们的协助下展现出更广阔的维度。你们现在所获得的，相当于一缕微弱的信号、一声遥远的细响、或一个模糊的影像。未来，正如我所说，维度将会扩展。你们自己的内在感官将带来比你们此刻所能想象的更真实的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The poetry has always been the result of facility in use of the inner senses, but until lately he was unable to give this sufficient pattern in terms of unitary form. His efforts in the book The Physical World as Idea Construction represented a breakthrough on his part. He realized, I believe, from the beginning that the conscious critical mind had little to do with the initial conception.
quotes.translation: 诗歌向来是运用内在感官之便利的结果，但直到最近他才能够以统一的形式赋予其足够的模式。他在《作为观念建构的物质世界》一书中的努力，代表了他个人的突破。我相信他从一开始就意识到，有意识的批判性心智与最初的构思几乎无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am not going to give you any lessons for levitation, any more than I gave Ruburt lessons in clairvoyance. Your own development and your own rate of assimilation will be the rule, as far as the movement of camouflage objects through camouflage space is concerned. Again, you are dealing with camouflage. You move camouflage objects through the use of your inner senses constantly without your own conscious knowledge. The trick is not to learn how, but to recognize the occurrence, and with practice this is possible.
quotes.translation: 我不会教你们任何漂浮术的课程，就像我教鲁柏透视术一样。就伪装物体在伪装空间中的移动而言，你们自己的发展和吸收速率将成为准则。再次强调，你们处理的是伪装。你们不断通过内我感官移动伪装物体，却毫无自觉意识。诀窍不在于学习如何做到，而在于识别这种发生，通过练习这是可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The sensations are a physical demonstration of an inner sense reaction on a psychic basis, or level, which you have not yet achieved, and cannot be expected to. The self would expand. In your relationship with your parents for example, such a psychic expansion of self would allow you to absorb your own awareness of their sometimes painful existence, and you would feel no wound yourself.
quotes.translation: 这些感觉是内我感官在心灵层面或层次上的物理展现，这个层面你们尚未达到，也不能期望你们达到。自我会扩展。例如，在与父母的关系中，这种自我的心灵扩展将使你们能够吸收自己对父母有时痛苦存在的觉察，而你们自己不会感到任何创伤。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Psychological vitality is a transformation of energy, again, into terms not recognizable by the outer senses. There are literally countless such manifestations of energy with which the outer senses are not familiar. The inner senses, to the contrary, are well aware of these manifestations, and of the existence of an open infinite system, within which they only are equipped to function.
quotes.translation: 心理活力是能量的转化，再次强调，转化为外我感官无法识别的形式。实际上存在无数这样的能量显现，外我感官对其并不熟悉。相反，内我感官却深知这些显现，以及一个开放无限系统的存在，它们只被装备在这个系统内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Suggestion, well used, with training and knowledge, will therefore allow you to alter the very cells of your body. The inner senses can be requested to operate in such a way that the ego will accept their communications. For the astral body is not some distant and alien other self, but it is even now that portion of yourself that you know but cannot see, that you feel but cannot touch.
quotes.translation: 因此，经过训练和知识，善加运用的暗示将使你们能够改变身体本身的细胞。可以请求内我感官以某种方式运作，使自我接受它们的沟通。因为星光体并非某个遥远而陌生的其他自我，而是即使现在也是你们知道却看不见、感觉却摸不着的那部分自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As far as the inner senses are concerned, they merge smoothly, one into the other, operating as a unit in what I will call pure unhampered circumstances. They work that way for me, for example, yet I must attempt to list them separately for you.
quotes.translation: 就内我感官而言，它们流畅地相互融合，在我所谓的纯粹无碍环境中作为一个单元运作。例如，它们对我就是这样运作的，然而我必须尝试为你们逐一列出它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Playfully done, these exercises will set into action other creative events. These will involve the utilization of some of the inner senses, for which you have no objective sense-correlations. You will understand situations better in daily life, because you will have activated inner abilities that allow you to subjectively perceive the reality of other people in a way that children do.
quotes.translation: 以游戏心态进行这些练习，将启动其他创造性事件。这些事件将涉及某些内我感官的运用，你们没有客观的感官对应物。你们将更好地理解日常生活中的情境，因为你们激活了内在能力，使你们能够像孩童一样主观地感知他人的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This inner sense is not only an important one but is immensely beneficial, and is not misused in any way by those able to use it. Very simply, these senses do not function until they can be handled correctly. This sense in no way involves invasion. It does not imply that one entity can control another. It merely involves direct, instantaneous cognition of the essence of living tissue.
quotes.translation: 这种内在感官不仅至关重要，而且极为有益，任何能够使用它的人都绝不会滥用。简单来说，这些感官只有在能被正确运用时才会发挥作用。这种感官绝不涉及侵犯，也不意味着一个存有可以控制另一个存有。它仅仅涉及对活组织本质的直接、即时的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. As you know, the inner senses belong to that part of human personality that is not physically materialized. At various times I have spoken concerning the reality of what you refer to as the astral body. You must remember that over a year ago we discussed tissue capsules. The astral body is of this nature. It is composed of electromagnetic components. It is simply the unseen self.
quotes.translation: 现在。如你所知，内在感官属于人类人格中未在物质层面显化的部分。我曾多次谈及你们所谓的星光体的实相。你必须记得，一年多前我们讨论过组织囊。星光体就具有这种性质。它由电磁成分构成，不过是那个看不见的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As you know the seasons are important to Ruburt. The combination of late winter and a pent-up emotional reaction to the room situation should be avoided if possible. He, Ruburt, has more psychic power than he knows, and an uncluttered feeling is important. He has an inner sense of order which may not be apparent, and a strong feeling for what he considers sacred or private functions.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，季节对鲁柏很重要。如果可能，应避免晚冬时节与因房间状况而压抑的情绪反应相结合。他，鲁柏，拥有比他意识到的更多的通灵能力，而保持清爽的感觉至关重要。他有一种可能不明显的内在秩序感，并且对他视为神圣或私密的功能有强烈感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner senses alone are equipped and able to process and perceive other reality systems. Even the distortions can be kept at a minimum with training. Indiscriminate use of the psychedelic drugs can severely shake up learned patterns of response, that are necessary for effective manipulation within physical reality, break subtle connections and disturb electromagnetic functions.
quotes.translation: 唯有内在感官具备处理并感知其他实相系统的能力。即使经过训练，扭曲也能被控制在最低限度。不加选择地使用迷幻药会严重动摇已习得的反应模式——这些模式对于在物质实相中有效运作是必要的——还会切断微妙的连接并干扰电磁功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I have also mentioned that as your outer senses can perceive the camouflage universe, and as they act within its laws, so also the inner senses are equipped to perceive the inner basic universe, and they directly are familiar with its laws.
quotes.translation: 我还提到过，正如你们的外在感官能感知伪装宇宙并在其法则内运作，内在感官也具备感知内在基本宇宙的能力，并且它们直接熟悉其法则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: --represents an outward transformation as Mark attempted to construct an accurate replica of material that he sensed with the inner senses, and as such it is the reconstruction of what I am. It represents the appearance that these abilities of mine take when at all closely connected with the physical plane. This does not necessarily mean that in all planes I have the same image.
quotes.translation: ——代表着一种外在转化，如同马克试图用内在感官感知到的材料构建精确的复制品，因此它是对我本质的重建。它代表了我的这些能力在紧密联系物质层面时所呈现的外貌。这并不一定意味着在所有层面上我都具有相同的形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （This "hanging before" appearance, it will be remembered, is remarkably similar to the effect I observed when the same three of us experimented with our first and only seance. See the 11th session, page 56. In this one, as Bill, Jane and I stared into a mirror, the reflection of Jane's head changed in size and shape, and finally appeared to hang in space just forward of the rest of her reflection. That appearance had taken place in much poorer light than tonight's event, however. This time I could see in detail the changes taking place, and their end. [Session 11 is in Vol. 1.]

quotes.text: The inner senses operate on all planes and under all circumstances. The outer senses vary according to plane and circumstance. The outer senses are dependable only in terms of the definite plane for which they were constructed. Their purpose of course is to enable the conscious personality to recognize as valid camouflage patterns which are only valid under certain conditions.
quotes.translation: 内在感官在所有层面和所有情况下运作。外在感官则随层面和情况而变化。外在感官仅在其被设计的特定层面中可靠，其目的自然是让有意识的人格能够识别那些仅在特定条件下有效的伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I went into the connection between the third inner sense and concepts for a reason, and this will now be an introduction into the fourth inner sense. And I am appalled: Getting this through Ruburts subconscious should be quite a trick.
quotes.translation: 我之所以探讨第三内在感官与概念之间的关联，自有其用意，而这将作为第四内在感官的引介。我深感棘手：要透过鲁柏的潜意识传递这些信息，着实是个难题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have told you that exterior reality is a materialization of inner electromagnetic reality. I have told you that all experience is electromagnetically coded. The inner senses pick up this data directly, you see, as in last Friday's episode. Some translation must occur if you are to become aware consciously of such material, or if it is to impress the physical senses at all.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉你们，外在实相是内在电磁实相的物质化呈现。我也说过，所有经验都以电磁方式编码。内在感官直接接收这些数据，正如上周五的章节所示。若要让你们有意识地觉察这类材料，或使其对物质感官产生印象，就必须进行某种转译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are in fact infinite varieties of matter, existing in what you would call (underlined) one space framework. Using the physical senses, you can of course never perceive the existence of these other systems. Advanced training with the inner senses can lead to such explorations however. Your friend is more advanced--his system is more advanced than yours in this respect.
quotes.translation: 事实上，物质存在无限多样，存在于你们所谓的（划线强调）同一空间框架内。运用物质感官，你们自然永远无法感知这些其他系统的存在。然而，通过内在感官的进阶训练，便能进行此类探索。你的朋友在这方面更为先进——他的系统比你们的系统更为先进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I am going to leave further discussion of this sense until some later session, when after additional material you will be able to understand it more thoroughly. And again remember that these senses, these inner senses, operate as a whole, and that at least to some degree the divisions between them are somewhat arbitrary on my part, and are made for the sake of simplicity.
quotes.translation: 关于这一感官的进一步讨论，我将留待日后某次课程，届时在补充材料的基础上，你们将能更透彻地理解。请再次谨记：这些感官，这些内在感官，是整体运作的，而我对它们所做的划分，至少在一定程度上是出于简化之便的权宜之计。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The sentence is really meaningless however, because the physical senses themselves are camouflage, you see. There would be nothing to translate. It is only use of the inner senses that will allow you to perceive under these circumstances. Theoretically, if you can bridge the gap between various reincarnations, then you can bridge the gap between your system and another.
quotes.translation: 不过，这句话其实毫无意义，因为物质感官本身就是伪装，你们明白吗。根本没有什么需要转译的。唯有运用内在感官，才能让你们在这些情况下进行感知。理论上，若你能跨越不同转世之间的鸿沟，便能跨越你的系统与另一个系统之间的鸿沟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The fear is the result of the mother's mockery of the father, and I believe this will make sense to Ruburt even consciously. The two of you are well equipped to help each other, which should make things easier. And Joseph, we will go into the inner senses shortly. I have given you some other general material somewhat in outline form as preparation for further sessions.
quotes.translation: 这种恐惧源于母亲对父亲的嘲弄，我相信这即使在意识层面也能让鲁柏理解。你们两人完全有能力互相扶持，这会让事情变得更容易。而约瑟夫，我们很快就要探讨内在感官了。我之前给过你们一些纲要式的通用资料，作为后续课程的准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You can, however, using your inner senses, perceive reality as it exists apart from the play and your role in it. In order to do this you must, of course, momentarily at least turn your attention away from the constant activity that is taking place -- turn off the physical senses, as it were -- and switch your attention to those events that have escaped you earlier.
quotes.translation: 然而，你可以运用内在感官，去感知独立于戏剧及其角色之外的实相。要做到这一点，你当然必须至少暂时将注意力从持续进行的活动中移开——可以说是关闭外在感官——并将注意力转向那些先前被你忽略的事件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will also go into this more deeply. You should be able to see now why a concept such as I refer to is difficult to achieve on your plane. You cannot focus upon it thoroughly. When the fourth inner sense is exercised, and I will outline exercises and all three of you would certainly benefit by following my suggestions, you will discover what an idea really is.
quotes.translation: 我还会更深入地探讨这一点。你现在应该能明白，为什么像我所指的概念在你的层面难以达成。你无法完全聚焦于它。当第四内在感官被运用时——我会概述练习方法，你们三人若遵循我的建议必定受益——你将发现一个理念的真正本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These psychological structures exist as prerequisites for the material structure of your universe. The inner senses represent such psychological structures. They become physically apparent to some degree in the emotions, which do have definite form, certain mass, depth, and solidity in the realm of psychological perspective which you do not physically perceive.
quotes.translation: 这些心理结构作为你们宇宙物质结构的前提而存在。内在感官就代表这样的心理结构。它们在情绪中会以某种程度显现为物理形态——在你们无法物理感知的心理视角领域中，情绪确实具有明确形态、特定质量、深度与实体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The man who lived in the house did have a destructive and sometimes cruel tendency. Nevertheless he was basically creative, and despite uncontrolled and undisciplined energies, his basic creative inner sense added to the psychic atmosphere, but would have turned against him had he remained.
quotes.translation: 曾住在这栋房子里的那个人确实具有破坏性甚至有时残忍的倾向。然而他本质上是具有创造力的，尽管能量不受控且缺乏纪律，他基本的创造性内在感官仍为心理氛围增添了色彩，但若他继续停留，这股力量终将反噬其身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When the ego becomes a mere observer rather than a controller, and momentarily suspends its rigid judgments, then inner direct experience is given some freedom and yet the ego is still aware of it. When the ego is completely or nearly completely subjugated, as in sleep, then there is direct experience through the inner senses, but no conscious awareness of it.
quotes.translation: 当自我成为纯粹的观察者而非控制者，并暂时搁置其僵化的评判时，内在的直接体验便获得某种自由，而自我仍能觉察到它。当自我被完全或近乎完全压制时——例如在睡眠中——内在感官会带来直接体验，但意识层面却毫无察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Here you can get the feel of them so that you know what you are working with. You are always and constantly in the process of transforming energy from the inner senses into physical idea constructions. I want you to become acquainted with the process by which you accomplish this unknowingly, so that you can then perform the same feats with your own awareness.
quotes.translation: 在此你能感受到它们，从而明白你正在处理的是什么。你始终持续不断地将来自内在感官的能量转化为物质性的意念建构。我希望你熟悉自己不知不觉完成这一过程的方式，这样你就能有意识地运用自身觉知达成同样的成就。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In some instances this happens despite the personality's attempt to hide the weight of the past. Also on many occasions the personality escapes the problems entirely. What happens here is that the subconscious communicates with the entity through the inner senses, to the effect that the present personality is not strong enough to handle the problem.
quotes.translation: 在某些情况下，即便人格试图隐藏过去的重量，这一过程仍会发生。也有许多时候人格完全逃避了问题。此时发生的是：潜意识通过内在感官与存有沟通，表明当前人格尚不足以处理该问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, about the inner senses. They fit together in a much more organized fashion than the outer senses do, and in some cases they tend to overlap. To describe them separately is difficult at best, their functions are so intertwined; and the distinctions between them are oftentimes extremely subtle. Too subtle in a few cases to be appreciated by you.
quotes.translation: 现在谈谈内在感官。它们比外在感官组织得更井然有序，某些情况下还会相互重叠。要分别描述它们极为困难，其功能如此盘根错节，彼此间的区别往往极其精微。在某些案例中，这种精微程度甚至超出你们的认知能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Julie, Steve, and Pete--You should all read any books you can find concerning parapsychology and psychic phenomena. The more you read the more you will understand of Pete's ability, and the more indeed that you can develop your own abilities. For each individual has inner senses, whether or not he knows that he does, and these should be developed.
quotes.translation: 朱莉、史蒂夫和皮特——你们都应该尽可能阅读关于超心理学和灵异现象的书籍。读得越多，就越能理解皮特的能力，也越能发展自身的能力。因为每个人都拥有内在感官，无论他是否知晓，这些感官都应当被开发。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In deeper dreams and fairly unusual projections, you can and do leave your own system entirely. Even though you are out of your physical body however, you will attempt to translate experience with its learned patterns rather than switching into the inner senses. This is why many such experiences, even if recalled, seem chaotic and without meaning.
quotes.translation: 在更深层的梦境和相当罕见的出体投射中，你们能够也确实会完全脱离自身系统。然而即便离开物质身体，你们仍会试图用习得的模式翻译经验，而非切换至内在感官。这就是为何许多这类经历即使被忆起，也显得混乱且毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are in no danger however as long as you pursue your present course, but you are in peril as soon as you change it. You will find that these loose predictions will come to pass. You understand that free will always operates, this being a foregone conclusion. I also am practical in my way. And speaking of practicality, you would find it most beneficial even in dealing with your precious camouflage patterns if you would develop the use of your inner senses.
quotes.translation: 只要你们坚持当前道路便毫无危险，但一旦改变方向就会陷入险境。你们会发现这些松散预言终将应验。你们明白自由意志始终在运作，这是毋庸置疑的结论。我也有自己的务实之道。说到务实，即便在处理你们珍视的伪装模式时，发展内在感官的运用也将带来极大裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Our relationship should enable you both to deal more adequately with the outside world. I will never suggest that you try to escape it. Your development of the inner senses will not blot out the outer world. It will enable you to see it more clearly for what it is, and therefore you will be able to manipulate camouflage patterns more adequately.
quotes.translation: 我们的关系应该能让你们双方更妥善地处理外在世界。我绝不会建议你们试图逃避它。你们内在感官的发展不会抹煞外在世界，反而会让你们更清楚地看清它的本质，从而更有效地操控伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is only through the use of this inner man, through the recognition of the functions of this inner man, that the race will ever use its potential. The outer senses will not help man to achieve the inner purpose which drives him. Empathy is an outer materialization, very superficial, of the first inner sense which we have discussed so briefly.
quotes.translation: 唯有通过运用这个内在自己，通过认识这个内在自己的功能，人类才能发挥其潜能。外在感官无法帮助人类达成驱动他们的内在目的。同理心是我们简要讨论过的第一内在感官的外在物质化表现，非常肤浅。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A point I wanted to add, Joseph. What you actually felt when the tree fell was the pain of the tree, in much muted form. The tree while dead still had consciousness. As a rule you will usually have such experiences to begin with through one inner sense. You are not adept enough yet to recognize inner data from more than one direction at a time.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，我想补充一点。当那棵树倒下时，你实际感受到的是树的痛苦，只是以非常微弱的形式呈现。树虽已死亡，却仍有意识。通常你们会先通过一种内在感官获得这类经验。你们目前还不够熟练，无法同时从多个方向辨识内在资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Psychological time so-called belongs to the inner self, that is to the mind. It is however a connective, a portion of one of the inner senses, which we will call for convenience the second inner sense.
quotes.translation: 所谓的心理时间属于内在自己，也就是心智。但它是一种连接物，是某个内在感官的一部分——为方便起见，我们称之为第二内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You recall I have told you that the intensity of an experience, rather than its duration in time, determines its effect. The intensity is Emotional. With the inner perceptions there will be a traveling through of intensities. The experience is perceived simultaneously by the inner senses, but it will be translated in terms of physical time.
quotes.translation: 你们记得我曾说过，决定经验效果的是其强度，而非时间上的持续长度。这种强度是情感性的。在内在感知中，会有各种强度的穿越流动。内在感官会同时感知到这些经验，但经验会被转化为物理时间的语言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When your eyes are open, do not take it for granted that only the immediately perceivable objects exist. Look where space seems empty, and listen in the middle of silence. There are molecular structures in every inch of empty space, but you have taught yourself not to perceive them. There are other voices, but you have conditioned your ears not to hear them. You use your inner senses when you are in the dream state, and ignore them when you are waking.
quotes.translation: 当你们睁开眼睛时，不要理所当然地认为只有立即能感知到的物体才存在。看向看似空无的空间，在寂静中倾听。每一寸空无的空间里都有分子结构，但你们已教会自己不去感知它们。还有其他的声音，但你们已训练自己的耳朵不去聆听。你们在梦境状态中使用内在感官，却在清醒时忽视它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I always like to have much energy on your part as reserve. It is true that in almost all cases our winter sessions will be most intensive, for various reasons. The matter of this reality, of which you know so little, will be the basis for future discussions, and indeed your inner senses will aid you in the perception of some of its facets.
quotes.translation: 我一向喜欢你们这边保有充沛的能量作为储备。确实，在几乎所有情况下，由于种种原因，我们的冬季课程将最为密集。你们所知甚少的这个实相本质，将成为未来讨论的基础，而你们的内在感官确实将协助你们感知其某些面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When you perceive more and more with your inner senses, you have more extensive raw material, better supplies, more available data. This should automatically bring about refinements within the physical structure to carry the additional data, and provide new outlets for materialization. The physical structure then to some extent is altered.
quotes.translation: 当你们越来越多地运用内在感官进行感知时，你们将拥有更广泛的原始素材、更充足的补给、更丰富的可用数据。这应会自动促使物质结构进行精炼，以承载额外数据，并为物质化提供新的出口。物质结构随后会在某种程度上发生改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Using the inner senses, we become conscious creators, cocreators. But you are unconscious cocreators whether you know it or not. If our environment seems unstructured to you, it is only because you do not understand the true nature of order, which has nothing to do with permanent form, but only appears to have form from your perspective.
quotes.translation: 运用内在感官，我们成为有意识的创造者、共同创造者。但无论你们是否知晓，你们都是无意识的共同创造者。如果我们的环境在你们看来缺乏结构，那仅仅是因为你们不了解秩序的真实本质——它与永恒形态无关，只是从你们的视角看来才呈现为形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The subconscious has great and rather astounding effect in dimensions other than your own, and it sends vivid projections into these other perspectives, that appear there and are in their turn perceived in distorting manner by the outward camouflage senses of those inhabitants. And yet their inner senses give them hints of your reality.
quotes.translation: 潜意识在你们自身维度以外的其他维度中具有巨大而惊人的影响力，它向这些其他视角投射出鲜活的影像，这些影像出现在那里，又被那些居民的外在伪装感官以扭曲的方式所感知。然而，他们的内在感官会给予他们关于你们实相的提示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The affair to which you have just referred was quite legitimate and it was an exercise in the use of the inner senses. Ruburt was also learning to receive and focus energy, and this is what occurred in the hand manifestation. In this case the class members were transmitters also, while Ruburt received and focused the combined force.
quotes.translation: 你刚才提到的那件事完全合理，那是一次运用内在感官的练习。鲁柏也在学习接收并聚焦能量，这正是手部显化中所发生的情况。在此案例中，课堂成员同时也是传输者，而鲁柏则接收并聚焦了这股合力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The inner senses are an attribute of consciousness. The outer senses make this information meaningful to the physical organism, and the body consciousness, the ego. This is for Ruburt's book.
quotes.translation: 内在感官是意识的一种属性。外在感官则使这些信息对物质有机体、身体意识和自我具有意义。这是为鲁柏的书准备的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You therefore create far more environments than you realize. Now, each actor, going about the role, focused within the play, has an inner guide line. He is not left, therefore, abandoned within a play that he has forgotten in his own creation. He has knowledge and information that comes to him through what I call the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 因此，你创造的环境远比你意识到的要多。现在，每个演员在扮演角色时，专注于剧本之内，都有一条内在的指引线。因此，他并非被遗弃在自己所遗忘的创作剧本中。他拥有通过我所谓的内在感官获得的知识与信息。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is true that I have lived as a human being, but this is simply a fact. This meeting and our other meetings are not seances, and your experiments with your friend Mark are not seances, according to the implications usually given. So-called seances, when they are legitimate, are simply exercises in the use of the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 我确实曾以人类身份生活过，但这仅仅是一个事实。这次会面以及我们其他的会面并非降神会，你与朋友马克的实验也非降神会，根据通常赋予的含义而言。所谓的降神会，当它们合法时，仅仅是运用内在感官的练习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I use the word directly loosely, for only the inner senses can really contact them without the necessity of distortions. To some extent, on their own level they have an awareness of the dreams in which they participate. They function to some extent independently. However your Emotional Moods become their psychological climate.
quotes.translation: 我使用“直接”一词较为宽松，因为只有内在感官才能真正接触它们而无需扭曲。在某种程度上，它们在自己的层面上对参与其中的梦境有所觉知。它们在一定程度上独立运作。然而，你的情绪状态成为它们的心理气候。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Ruburt uses dissociation in order to free his abilities so that they may be used more effectively. The telepathy occurrence with your witness is an example. However it is also true that this opening allows me entry. Joseph, you will find that your experiences with the inner senses occur often at split moments of dissociation.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏使用解离来释放他的能力，以便它们能被更有效地运用。与你的见证人之间发生的千里眼事件便是一个例子。然而，这种开放也确实允许我进入。约瑟，你会发现你与内在感官的体验常常发生在解离的瞬间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It has often been said that the subconscious has a generalized focus, but the subconscious and inner senses have as strong and vital and intensified a focus as the focus of the conscious mind. The phenomena perceived is merely of a different nature, and in this state of which I have spoken no real intensification is possible.
quotes.translation: 常有人说潜意识具有普遍化的焦点，但潜意识与内在感官拥有与意识心同样强烈、生动且集中的焦点。所感知的现象仅仅是性质不同，而在我所说的这种状态中，真正的强化是不可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: One of the advantages of the inner senses as they operate together is this ability to experience whole entirety patterns, and it is difficult to dilute this, to drop it so to speak, drop by drop. I would like to say something about Joseph's experience the other evening, but I also want to go into the invention of the soul.
quotes.translation: 内在感官共同运作的优势之一，便是这种体验整体模式的能力，而很难将其稀释，可以说是将其一点一滴地滴落。我想谈谈约瑟前几晚的经历，但我也想深入探讨灵魂的发明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This designation does not include the entity as a whole, however. The personality does have access to the entity, but the personality does not contain the entity. In other words the whole self as it exists on your plane does not contain the entity, although communication between the entity and the whole self can and does take place by means of the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个称谓并不包含整个存有。人格确实能接触到存有，但人格并不包含存有。换句话说，存在于你们层面上的整体自己并不包含存有，尽管存有与整体自己之间可以通过内在感官进行沟通，而且这种沟通确实会发生。

quotes.text: You can intellectually understand what I am telling you, but the brain （shaking head） cannot experience reality directly. This experience must come from the mind, through use of the inner senses. I want it understood that camouflage physical reality is indeed a reality, even while it is a distortion of something else.
quotes.translation: 你们可以在理智上理解我所说的话，但大脑（摇头）无法直接体验实相。这种体验必须来自心灵，通过运用内在感官。我希望你们明白，伪装物质实相确实是一种实相，即使它是对其他事物的扭曲。
